clean_body: Merry Christmas and a Happy Hanukkah! | | | | | | | Mid December Update 2022 | "The time has come to dare to show the world that our civilized ideas, our traditions, our values, are not like the ideology and war machine of totalitarian societies, just a façade of strength. It is time for the world to know our intellectual and spiritual values are rooted in the source of all strength a belief in a supreme being and a law higher than our own." -President Ronald Reagan | | | ---|--- | Tracy and I are excited to have 3 of our 5 children coming home for Christmas. We wish you and yours a Merry Christmas and a Happy Hanukkah! As a Navy SEAL and now member of the Virginia House of Delegates, I was honored to successfully carry HB1128 in 2022, a bill to reduce taxes on veteran retirement pay up to $40k. This success is nearly 30 years in the making, but there is more we must do for our veterans. I am now fighting to remove the age 55 requirement the state senate put on my bill in 2022 and I am happy Governor Youngkin put the money to do just that in the budget! In addition to working with other legislators and preparing legislation for January, I am gearing up my campaign to be your next State Senator District 10. Learn more at == and email mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com to volunteer, get a sign, and more. Please share! Here is some of what I've been up to around the district and some of what's on my mind. | New Paint Job? | | New paint job! This truck actually belongs to one of my supporters in Powhatan. What do you think? | TikTok Ban | | Way to go governor Youngkin! ￼ Our enemies are using these apps to spy on the American people and collect data. ￼We should have banned apps like Tik Tok a long time ago!￼ | Powhatan County Republican Committee Christmas Party | | | We made new friends at the Powhatan County Republican Committee Christmas Party at 3 Crosses Distillery in Downtown Powhatan. We honored and gave support to the Powhatan Christmas Mother, Cathy Ware. Fay Williamson, a VFRW past president, installed the Mill Quarter Republican Women's Club 2023 Officers. We enjoyed meeting everyone and appreciate all you do to support our community! | A Good Dog | == | Casper, a 21-month-old Great Pyrenees (just like Remi) hopped a four-foot fence and killed eight of 11 coyotes on his property and chased away the rest. Five sheep were unharmed. Despite suffering life-threatening injuries in a Nov. 4 attack, Casper has recovered and returned home. The fearless sheepdog has emerged as a hero across the internet since his story was first reported by Decaturish. == | Fork Union Military Academy | | Thank you Col David L. Coggins, USMC (Ret.) for allowing me to speak to the Fork Union Military Academy FUMA in Fluvanna County. This year this Christian school for boys celebrates 125 years of helping prepare young men for life and they do this without Govt Assistance. FUMA alum includes two Medal of Honor recipients, 117 NFL players, and two Heisman Trophy winners from Fort Union Military Academy! == == == | Championship Bling! | | It really is amazing what we can achieve when we put our differences aside, respect each other, and work as a team! We received a little "bling" from the State Champions! For 24 years, my day job is helping corporate/ athletic teams and individuals improve. It is an honor to play a part in many division one college and high school championships. While campaigning around the district a few folks asked me about my day job. Here is a recent video that might motivate you: == == == | Mannheim Steamroller Christmas concert! | | | | | We had so much fun at the Mannheim Steamroller Christmas concert! Mannheim Steamroller has sold over 41 million albums. The music industry told Chip, "Don't do a Christmas album because that will signal the end of your career." Mannheim Steamroller Christmas went on to sell five million copies after Chip produced it himself -- and changed the sounds of Christmas music forever. Mannheim Steamroller is the #1 Christmas music artist of all times, selling over 31+ million albums. The second highest Christmas artist is Elvis Presley with 17 million albums. | VA State Capitol Christmas Tree Lighting | | | | | | | At the Annual Christmas Tree Lighting and Executive Mansion Tour 2022 Governor Youngkin said "I hope that we can all find a way to help one another this Christmas season - to show support and love to all of those who may be celebrating alone or away from family or serving our great country overseas," Youngkin also said. "And in light of the tragic events over the last few weeks, may we all remember the departed and open our hearts to express love for the families of the victims in Chesapeake and in Charlottesville." == | Bethlehem Walk 2022 | | | Bethlehem Walk 2022. We experienced the Christmas Story live and in person! Since its inaugural season in 2003, Bethlehem Walk has thrilled and emotionally touched visitors from across the Commonwealth. Each December, Salem Baptist Church partners with various churches to reach thousands of people with this interactive Gospel drama that takes visitors through scenes ranging from the entrance of the Savior into the world to an empty Jewish tomb. | Louisa County Parks and Recreation Christmas Parade | | | | The Louisa County Parks and Recreation did an incredible job with their Annual Christmas Festival & Parade. We enjoyed seeing everyone. Hooyah, Merry Christmas and Happy Hanukkah! | Goochland Republican Women Club | | | | Thank you Goochland Republican Women's club for all you do to support our community. We had a good time at your December 2022 Brunch. | Pearl Harbor Remembered | | | | | | | We attended the Beaverdam American Legion Post 90 Pearl Harbor Remembrance ceremony and Holiday Brunch in Hanover County where we remembered a day that will live in infamy and honored those who sacrificed all for freedom. | A Bad Deal | | We are happy to have Griner home because she is an American Citizen, but why choose her over a US Marine who sacrificed for us and loves our country? Releasing "The Merchant of Death" will clearly get more people killed around the world. | Senator Amanda Chase's Christmas Gala | | | | | Tracy and I had a good time at Senator Amanda Chase's Christmas Gala. Senator Chase is an incumbent running for reelection in Senate District 12. Please ask friends to vote for her at the June 20 primary. Learn more at her website here == | Happy Birthday Governor Youngkin | | We celebrated Governor Youngkin's birthday 9 December. He has put together an incredible team and is working hard to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. Isn't it great we have a Republican Governor in Virginia who prays and genuinely supports parents, veterans, law enforcement, lower taxes and more! | General AP Hill | | Are you sick of Cancel Culture in Richmond? The last confederate monument in Richmond, General AP Hill was removed. General AP Hill's body was moved to a cemetery in Culpepper, VA. The family is suing to make sure the statue doesn't end up at a water treatment plant like the other Confederate monuments. History should be taught not erased. ￼ If leftist do not agree with a point of view, it must be silenced. ￼ We have one party rule in our cities led by crooked politicians with a Marxist worldview who encourage or support anti-American propaganda. You must get involved and make your voice heard at the ballot box. == | Hanover County GOP Christmas Party! | | | | We had a wonderful time with friends at the Hanover County GOP Christmas Party! I really appreciate the shoutout from South Anna Supervisor Sue Dibble. We are making friends all over the New Senate District 10! | Goochland High School Veterans Project | | | | Thank you to the Goochland High School Veterans Project for all you do to support our veterans. Fellow Veterans, and I had a great time at your holiday party and we enjoyed talking with teachers and students. | Lunch Smokin' Eddies BBQ | | | | We stopped by Smokin' Eddies BBQ in Louisa County where we ran into some wonderful people! | Powhatan Christmas Parade | | My wife Tracy and I enjoyed meeting so many people at the Powhatan Christmas parade. Our polar bear Remington was a huge hit!￼￼￼￼￼ | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | We had so much fun at the Powhatan County Christmas Parade. Thank you to all our volunteers who shook hands, handed out signs, and wished everyone a Merry Christmas! | RIP Delegate Ronnie Campbell | | We are deeply saddened by the passing of our friend and fellow Delegate Ronnie Campbell of Rockbridge County. He spent his whole life in service to others; mostly as a law-enforcement officer, school board member, board of supervisors, and as a member of the Virginia House of Delegates. Because he was so genuine, I always called him the real deal. It was an honor to work with you Ronnie and you will be missed. Tracy and I are sending prayers to your family. | Louisa GOP Meeting/ Christmas Party | | | We had a good time at the Louisa GOP Meeting/ Christmas Party. Thank you to everyone for your hard work on the 2022 elections! | Appomattox County Promises Kept! | | | | | | | Appomattox County: We attended the VMF == Open House with Governor Youngkin, other elected officials, and citizens of Appomatox County. We celebrated Virginia Metalfab on their company expansion to the old Thomasville Building on Founders Lane in Appomattox! Governor Youngkin announced that Virginia MetalFab will invest $9 million to expand to the larger facility and the project will create 130 new jobs over the next three years. "The spirit of Virginia is alive and well," Youngkin said. "And it just brings such joy to see it alive and well here in Appomattox." We took a tour of the old 250,000-square-foot building and spoke with employees excited with hope for the future! | Delegate Buddy Fowler Meet & Greet Louisa County | | | | | We packed the house in Louisa County to help conservative Delegate Buddy Fowler get re-elected. Thank to our supporters and thank you Smokin' Eddies BBQ for the delicious food! | Monte W. Mayes Appomattox County | | | There is a lot of history and some amazing people in Senate District 10. Thank you Monte Mays for the history lesson and advice. It will be an honor to continue service as your next state senator! | Republican Party of Virginia Commonwealth Dinner | Alyssa Chalifoux | Delegate Les Adams | | | | | | | National Committee man Morton Blackwell endorsed John McGuire for state senate | Tracy and I enjoyed the return of the Republican Party of Virginia Commonwealth Dinner. The best part was catching up with friends and fellow patriots from all over the Commonwealth. We can win back the senate in 2023. Governor Youngkin said "When we bring people together we win!" | Buckingham County GOP Fundraiser | | A Message from the Buckingham GOP: The Buckingham County Republican Committee will have a fundraiser from Monday, December 19th, 2022 until Monday, January 9th, 2023 for a 2017 White House Christmas Ornament from President Trump's first Christmas in the White House. The person who has the highest donation to the Buckingham County Republican Committee by Monday, January 9th, 2023 by 5pm will win the ornament. You may contact Chairwoman Ramona Christian at 4343-391-4546. mailto:ramonachristian862@gmail.com Donations may be also be made through CASH APP : $BuckinghamCountyGOP | Virginia Free Luncheon | | Secretary of Transportation Shep Miller (center) | | Fmr State Senator Bill Carrico | | Delegate Mike Cherry & Chris Saxmon | | AG Jason Miyares | Rappahannock Electric Co Op Lindsey Watson | | Following the Joint Money Committee Budget presentation by Governor Glenn Youngkin, we attended the Virginia Free Luncheon at the historic Jefferson Hotel. If you get a chance, you should check out their amazing Christmas decorations. | Hanover American Legion Post 90 Fundraiser | | | We attended the American Legion == Heating and Cooling Replacement Fundraiser in Beaverdam Hanover County. The Christmas Spirit, dancing, and conversation were the best. Thank you for supporting a good cause! | Appomattox High School Government Class | | | | | The Appomattox Mayor Rick Connor and I answered questions and spoke with students and teachers at the Appomattox High School Government class. We spoke on the importance of preserving our Constitutional Republic, why Democrats joined the Republican Party in droves for President Reagan, local, state federal issues, my role as a member of the Virginia House of Delegates, and my experience as a Navy SEAL. We loved seeing patriotism promoted around the school. Thank you to all our educators for all you do to prepare our young people for life! | Cool Water Christmas Party Hanover County | | | Delegate Buddy Fowler is the incumbent for House of Delegates District 59 that includes parts of Hanover, Louisa, and Henrico. We made many new friends at his Cool Water Christmas Party in Hanover County. Please click this link to learn more: == | Fluvanna GOP | | We had several candidates for 2023 show up at the Fluvanna GOP Committee Meeting. Thank you Fluvanna GOP chair Darrell Byers and Committee Members for allowing us to speak. We had a great time! | Holiday Cheer at the Governors Mansion! | | | Many fellow legislators and I attended the holiday cheer party with Governor Youngkin and first lady Suzanne Youngkin at the executive mansion. Governor Youngkin spoke on unity and hope for the future in 2023. He also wished everyone a Merry Christmas, Happy Hanukkah, and Happy Holiday! | Vulnerable Power Stations | == | It is clear our energy sources are vulnerable and we really need to step up security for our substations and other vital infrastructure around our country. CARTHAGE, N.C. (AP) -- Tens of thousands of people braced for days without electricity in a == where authorities say two power substations were shot up by one or more people with apparent criminal intent. ==. | We will have a convention, probably in May, for State Senate District 10. Please == and fill out the form to submit your commitment to being a delegate for John McGuire at the Senate District 10 convention. We do not have a date or location for you to vote yet, but by signing up now we can keep you informed and let you know when we know ASAP. I'm running for State Senate so we can un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | == | | | | == | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life Pro-Gun America 1st Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == | == == == Past Newsletters: End of November == Mid November == End of October == Mid October == September == End of August == Mid August == End of July == == == == Mid June == May == April == March == Week 9 == Week 8. == Week 7 == Week 6. == Week 5. == Week 4. == Week 3. == Week 2. == Week 1 == Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | McGuire for Delegate | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA Dec. 19th: No more spending sprees from the lame ducks!
body:
| | | |
---
---
Please see below for details about this week’s call to action, as well as our wishes for our friends who celebrate Hannukah.
---
| | |
---
---
Today is the first day of Hanukkah, and we want to wish our friends who celebrate it a most joyous festival of lights! May you be surrounded by family, friends, love, and abundance; and your home and heart be filled with life.
---
|
---
| | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIzNTMtZTAzN2ZjMzhjNDY4NGM0ZDgyMGE1YzE4NjZiMzBlNzEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnL2ZpbmQtc2VuYXRvcnM_bWlkPTQ2MjIwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/kD7R_ru2m8qhrUOmchgImg)
---
Congress has passed a short-term spending bill that will expire on December 23rd, contrary to what conservatives were recommending. We suggested Congress pass a short-term spending bill that would last until March, so that the newly-elected Congress could make the spending decisions – not the people who lost their seats and are retiring. This would have also avoided any sort of Christmas showdown. However, that’s what they want. They want to be able to threaten a “Christmas shutdown” unless their enormous, pork-filled, omnibus spending bill is passed. This omnibus bill would last all the way until the new fiscal year starts in October 2023, meaning the new members of Congress would have no say on America’s spending their first year in office. We don’t have the votes to stop this in the House, but we have a chance to stop the omnibus in the Senate, but only if we apply pressure now. Call your Senators today and demand they fund the government until March 2023, and no longer. Tell them –
* They are depriving voters of our voice and our votes by denying new members the ability to have a say on spending
* Americans of all political ideologies despise bills thousands of pages long that hide pay-offs and gifts to the friends of members – using our tax dollars – and we want this to stop
* No omnibus spending bill in the lame duck!

---
[CALL THE SENATE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIzNTMtZTAzN2ZjMzhjNDY4NGM0ZDgyMGE1YzE4NjZiMzBlNzEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnL2ZpbmQtc2VuYXRvcnM_bWlkPTQ2MjIwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/jLE0LaApJyiPi32ZT7L-ug)
---
|
---
| | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-0npjhJItBugW6VCw8ut6w)
---
As an organization driven by the grassroots, at the end of every year we send out a survey for the grassroots to fill out with questions that help us figure out the focus and other work for the new year. These surveys are extremely important in determining the direction of the organization, so please, please fill it out as soon as you can!
---
[COMPLETE MY SURVEY](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-kBNQ)
---
|
---
| | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIzNTMtZTAzN2ZjMzhjNDY4NGM0ZDgyMGE1YzE4NjZiMzBlNzEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHA6Ly93YXRjaC5pbm5vdmF0aW9ucmFjZW1vdmllLmNvbS8_bWlkPTQ2MjIwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/UC-SPvugk_xYu2Avjn1cWQ)
---
Our newest documentary has now been released as a Virtual Cinema Event, and **from now until January 1st, you can watch the film for only $3.99!** This means you can watch _Innovation Race_ from the comfort of your own home, and for a discounted price. Simply **[go to the website](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIzNTMtZTAzN2ZjMzhjNDY4NGM0ZDgyMGE1YzE4NjZiMzBlNzEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHA6Ly93YXRjaC5pbm5vdmF0aW9ucmFjZW1vdmllLmNvbS8_bWlkPTQ2MjIwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/42tDnDURrMkdEJP1aV5oFA)** to buy your Virtual Cinema tickets with the holiday promo pricing and to get all the details!
---
[WATCH THE FILM](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIzNTMtZTAzN2ZjMzhjNDY4NGM0ZDgyMGE1YzE4NjZiMzBlNzEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHA6Ly93YXRjaC5pbm5vdmF0aW9ucmFjZW1vdmllLmNvbS8_bWlkPTQ2MjIwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/1dtMmUF9eAO2dZN5uRtF2Q)

name: Brent Bozell
subject: Elon Musk bought a crime scene
body:
Elon Musk claims his life is in great danger — and I believe he may be right.
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsr25uhou54ki38b7886ng8u0g2itbve97rvhva8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm8p76c1h2bs)
Friend,

Elon Musk claims his life is in great danger -- and I believe he may be right.

Elon recently revealed to the world that a cabal of government and private sector elites are working in unison to influence the elections.

He didn't buy a social media company. He bought a crime scene showing corruption and election interference at the deepest levels of government and society.

This is just one example of the unified assault that the government and corporate elites are perpetuating on the American republic through **Big Tech censorship, radical leftwing propagandists in the media, and deep state agents in our government. **

And this is what the Media Research Center (MRC) has been revealing to the public, even before Elon Musk.

My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

**MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.**

And we're going to war against the media to hold them accountable and expose their Deep State corruption.

[_**MRC is raising $15,000 before the New Year, and I need your help. Can you donate $10, $25, $50, or any amount today? Click here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za2j9liie2g66ruae1fm8te39lsj8lfgv0ef5j8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm8p76c1h2bs)

Now Elon is working to stop this, taking steps like firing Twitter's former deputy general counsel James Bake for suppression of information:
* Elon promised a blitz of internal Twitter documents -- the **Twitter Files** -- starting with the 2020 decision to block users from sharing coverage of Hunter Biden's leaked laptop files.

* Journalist Matt Taibbi shared that Baker had "vetted" the first installment of the **Twitter File** s, then **delayed** the release of the second installment in defiance of Elon's plan.

* Elon found that Baker's "explanation was . . . unconvincing" and promptly fired Baker.

Elon's life is at risk because he is exposing the Deep State Media -- so you and I can prepare for the battle for America's freedom. But this also shows the deep state agents are embedded in American corporations.

[_**Can you send your urgent donation to MRC and help us defeat Big Tech censors? Click here to send your gift today >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfjnqr81tuh88h1gro0urnd0bi5kr5r1fokrunf8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm8p76c1h2bs)

How does the Media Research Center expose the left-wing media?

MRC's Newsbuster has a Free Speech division that is solely dedicated to exposing Big Tech censorship. Through MRC's CensorTrack, we have recorded 4,769 instances of Big Tech censorship.

**Our CensorTrack has been used in high profile court cases against the Biden admin. **

MRC has DESTROYED the Media's reputation, but we still have a long way to go.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. **

Friend, it is no exaggeration to say that the fight against the Deep State Media corruption is a fight for America itself. Can you join MRC and help us reach our goal of $15,000 this month?

**Click below to donate.**

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8uh3ilit016ftg85d2g2dj73jkn2580t214p7co_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm8p76c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ziedqns61at6km7jkosl89ec9vmldluqktti8af0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm8p76c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze3ek5493hhc0phldioqp6qc90s9v7pruh45jf28_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm8p76c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4up5imcaiv051k0a9g77qjk8dbkjocc5ljtfsto_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm8p76c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqo435kvjdcfmlebo4b1iqbmoujucvbak3a0bu40_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm8p76c1h2bs)

body:
But otherwise, how’s the week going?
| | | | |

| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T014c7af5-a2b2-49cb-91a6-f89c2a1cc8ef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, We hope all the members of the Blue Amp Action community are having a restful, hopeful & meaningful holiday season. Below is the latest newsletter with what we think you may wanna know: *** Elon Musk is Donald Trump. _THE TRUE STORY_** of his narcissism, cruelty, over-hyped business acumen & much more **_WILL SHOCK & SURPRISE YOU. _**It's become clear since Elon bought Twitter and opened his yap to share conspiracy & hate regularly. [You MUST WATCH this comparison](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdd52c5f0-a020-4736-a74d-fcc4332f6ddf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). -> [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aw1rNypVFZY](https://default.salsalabs.org/T73588930-dd2e-45ad-b426-e15cc55e1edd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * **According to numerous sources** : Today Donald Trump reportedly gets referred for three criminal counts by the Jan 6th Committee. If it occurred by the time you get this, sing Hallelujah. If not, fingers crossed, my friends. * **Donald Trump's digital trading cards 🙃. **[That was his big announcement. _Really_. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T586b86ae-87e2-4c0d-a1f3-d219e33184a2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)Seems like a money laundering scheme. So..[enjoy satire at Trump's expense, as I join my partner at my Blue Amp Channel to guess images Trump may use](https://default.salsalabs.org/T380eb01e-6f21-4950-95ab-6386559e9693/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). Link:[ https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=I5oo8zoi_1g&t=16s](https://default.salsalabs.org/T426c2a2a-1daa-40f7-9a30-382713d69e0d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * **Not politics: **Argentina won its third World Cup yesterday, in perhaps the best finals game in the competition's history. As if scripted, Lionel Messi, arguably the best player of all time (I'd make the argument), scored two goals, to win his first World Cup in his last appearance in the quadrennial event. * ** During a rising tide of anti-Semitism, millions of Jews worldwide have begun to celebrate the festival of lights**, doing what they've done for centuries when threatened--carrying on and giving thanks. We stand with our Jewish brothers & sisters in celebration. Chag Sameach, friends! Thanks for reading this edition of the Blue Amp Action Newsletter! In solidarity, Cliff [**PS: Appreciate our work finding timely actions and good candidates to share with you? Your $5 contribution would mean vital support for our network’s efforts to defend urgent and timely progressive causes in the coming year.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9bccb82b-4602-4ec0-a1d4-e566d6992e9a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T283443a6-15c3-4e0b-9187-461a4cd2d862/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
A.G. Holder on how SCOTUS should decide Moore v. Harper
|
---

Friend -- A.G. Holder is extremely concerned. He said on “Face the Nation” that the dangerous theory at the core of _Moore v. Harper_ would “put our system of checks and balances at risk” if the Supreme Court sides with extremist Republicans.
As a former attorney general and voting rights expert, A.G. Holder weighed in:[**“If the Court does the right thing, you should have a _nine to zero opinion_ that rejects this notion of this independent state legislature doctrine.”**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56159774/384080208/1243905992?source=20221216_AOTL_A_ehhnews_ActivesxOpeners&refcode=20221216_AOTL_A_ehhnews_ActivesxOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlNzIyN2ZiLWM2N2YtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Sl8i5qPbORv9amEqJbEAhGZCmgr7IIvpHtu8HLbVYHs=)
The decision will come down to siding with voters and 100 years of constitutional precedent -- or siding with map manipulators who want to reinstate an unconstitutional gerrymandered map in North Carolina.
The Supreme Court should protect checks and balances in redistricting!

__

Hi Friend. Steve Scalise here.
I need feedback from someone I know I can trust.
[**Do you have a minute to take my Majority Leader Survey?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9i7ibiqd86i82roq343r0m0eipmk2ri4c9kh760_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm8p72cth2bs) It'll be quick. I promise.
Congressional leaders and staff will read through your individual response to fully understand the most pressing issues impacting our top Patriots. The Radical Left has left our country in shambles and we need a roadmap to help us recover.
With so many concerns like securing our border, stopping woke teachings in schools, defending our 2nd Amendment rights, and preserving our Conservative Majority on the Supreme Court, we need your immediate feedback. **So I 'm turning to the people I can trust the most for invaluable guidance.**
[**Can you take just a moment to take my Majority Leader Survey?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6r7j45jb105pq6bqbu88ea1n8knocmuehduq9fg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm8p72cth2bs) Your feedback will go a long way to help save America!
Thank you,
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4p68nptiid1d2gemud21fg72vbukncelrgga1lg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm8p72cth2bs)

name: Mia Bonta
subject: Peter, you’re personally invited!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2022, FPPC# 1437973
body:
Dear Peter,
You’re personally invited to join me this upcoming Wednesday, December 21st, from 6pm-7:30pm for a Holiday Celebration and Meet & Greet with the AD-18 ADEM Progressive & Labor Unity Slate!
>> RSVP for the Progressive & Labor Unity Slate Holiday Celebration [https://www.eventbrite.com/e/adem-unity-slate-holiday-meet-greet-tickets-489940413967]
The Holidays and New Year are not the only thing around the corner – there’s also an important local election only a month away! In January, the CA Democratic Party will hold the biennial Assembly District Delegate election. Delegates play a crucial role in steering party priorities, endorsing candidates, and serving as vital links between our community and the Democratic Party.
I’m proud to support 14 local leaders running to represent AD-18 on the 2022 ADEM Progressive & Labor Unity Slate!
Unity Slate members are champions for progressive values, working people, and effective advocacy. Each candidate on this slate is deeply rooted to our local community and are forces for change; advancing important issues such as housing affordability, healthcare, and access to public education.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89949/images/ad18%20progressive.jpg]
RSVP [https://www.mobilize.us/lizortegaforassembly2022/event/537168/]
To be able to vote in this election, you must:
Be a registered Democrat in Oakland, Alameda, or Emeryville
Register to vote in the election by December 31st
It takes two minutes to register to vote – please request a ballot here! [https://ademelections.com/register/mail]
Do you want to learn more about this upcoming election, meet the candidates on the Labor & Progressive Unity Slate, and spend some time with our community ahead of the holidays? If you answered yes to any of those questions, RSVP today to confirm your attendance! [https://www.eventbrite.com/e/adem-unity-slate-holiday-meet-greet-tickets-489940413967]
With gratitude,
Assemblymember Mia Bonta
RSVP [https://www.mobilize.us/lizortegaforassembly2022/event/537168/]
Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2022, FPPC# 1437973
1241 High St, Oakland, CA 94601 | 415-891-9751 | volunteer@miabonta.com
https://www.facebook.com/miabonta [https://www.facebook.com/miabonta] https://twitter.com/MiaBonta [https://twitter.com/MiaBonta] https://instagram.com/mia.bonta [https://instagram.com/mia.bonta] https://www.linkedin.com/in/mialisabonta/ [https://www.linkedin.com/in/mialisabonta/]

name: =?utf-8?Q?Semi=20Bird?=
subject: Christmastime is here!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BIRD FOR GOVENROR**
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=95a01d3ebd&e=fdefed58de)
---
Peter,First of all, **MERRY CHRISTMAS** from Washington State! I hope you are enjoying time with your family and friends. We all have reason to rejoice as we celebrate the real reason for the season: the birth of our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ. It is a joyful time for Christians like ourselves.Beyond Christ’s birth, however, joy for the average American citizen can be hard to find. Statistics like the ones below, should give all Americans pause:Since Biden took office, the average family has lost $5,800 in real annual income.In November, the national average price for a gallon of regular gasoline was $3.68 per gallon, up from $2.42 per gallon prior to Biden’s electionEnergy prices have increased by 18% in the past year.**What does that mean for you? Well, when income is down and fuel and energy prices are up, it means all of us are going to have a rough winter. But you already knew that, didn’t you? I hear from future constituents all over Washington State who tell me they are pinching pennies just to buy a few basic presents for under the tree and ingredients for Christmas cookies.****That’s why I’m running for Governor of this great state!**
| [HELP ME WIN THIS RACE!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c273c81654&e=fdefed58de)
---
The people of this great state are eager for accountability in its leadership, to help bring about positive change for all. We are not just stronger, but far more effective, when we work together as Washingtonians to create actionable solutions.I’m running to replace Jay Inslee in 2024, because he has given up on this great state and the great people who live here. Washington state is typically thought of as a Blue state, but those who live here know better. **With the right Republican running, we can absolutely win. I’m that Republican... and I’m starting early!**
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=7fe0bad72d&e=fdefed58de)
My mother raised me to have a servant’s heart and from my time in the Army Special Forces, I developed a commitment to preserving our freedom and building a better future for our children. I am a father myself, and I worry every day about the consequences that progressive policies and crippling national debt could have on the lives of young Americans.Currently, Americans are experiencing record-high inflation which threatens families with higher costs to drive their cars and heat their homes, all while the Biden administration spends your tax dollars into oblivion.Friend, we all know that the midterm elections did not produce the “Red Wave” we were all hoping for but it’s not too late for all of us to pitch in and do something about it. Together, Conservatives from all over the country can fight to return power to the people and create a better future for all Americans!Please chip into my campaign today if you want to join in that fight. Any donation, no matter how small, will make a difference! We’re starting early on fundraising and we’re going to have to do this on our own. That’s how I’ve always done it, but trust that I can make a little go a long way.I want to start off 2023 with some STRONG fundraising numbers and secure this nomination - can I count on you to join my campaign today?

| [DONATE $25 TO THE CAMPAIGN!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=49dc879da8&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $50 TO THE CAMPAIGN!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=ba135069ef&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $75 TO THE CAMPAIGN!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=b46bc41c74&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $150 TO THE CAMPAIGN!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=32a3682dad&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $350 TO THE CAMPAIGN!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=9b765da7a0&e=fdefed58de)
---
Thank you and God Bless you,
Semi BirdCandidate for Washington Governor
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
**PAID FOR BY BIRD FOR GOVENROR**
|

We overcame unprecedented opposition heading into the midterms, but thanks to the support of folks like you in the community, we were able to come together and pull off a huge win. Now that we’re in the holiday season, it’s important that we all take time to reflect and relax with our loved ones. I hope your holidays are peaceful and the days ahead are bright. Many blessings for a healthy and joyful New Year to you and yours! name: Mark Takano
subject: re: January 6th.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
What we saw and heard was heartbreaking and disturbing.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56161055/384084926/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjk3ZWIyYi1jYjdmLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lyp8t3Wh-saarYAyBFQqVy9hxtR4rwYTkSoIGstcJDw=)
---
**Peter, the events of January 6th continue to haunt us.**

But that’s especially true for the Capitol Police who put their lives on the line that day to defend the U.S. Capitol and the lawmakers inside (including myself).

In the days following, multiple Capitol Police members died, **while the MAGA Republicans on the other side of the aisle _pretended nothing even happened._**

Since then, we heard harrowing testimony from some of the Capitol Police who were serving on January 6th -- reaffirming the events of that day. And what we heard was heartbreaking and disturbing: _“For most people, Jan. 6 happened for a few hours. But for those of us who were in the thick of it, it has not ended.”_
_\--_
_“I was grabbed, beaten, tased, all while being called a traitor to my country. I was at risk of being stripped of and killed with my own firearm.”_
_\--_
_“Some people are trying to deny what happened. To whitewash it... Let's be clear. The rioters who tried to rob us of our democracy were propelled here by a lie.”_ **Despite all this, MAGA Republicans are STILL trying to undermine, downplay, and LIE about January 6th. They’re trying to obstruct justice and stop the good work of the Jan. 6th select committee.**

[**Peter, the committee’s work is far too important to be undermined by far-right Republicans. That’s why I need 10,000 grassroots supporters to support the January 6th committee and tell Republicans in Congress to stop the lies and do their jobs to protect our democracy NOW. Can I count on you? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56161057/384084933/960040669?refcode=MTFC_20221219_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjk3ZWIyYi1jYjdmLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lyp8t3Wh-saarYAyBFQqVy9hxtR4rwYTkSoIGstcJDw=&emci=9d730cee-c37f-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=e697eb2b-cb7f-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=18839602) | [10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56161060/384084935/960040669?refcode=MTFC_20221219_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjk3ZWIyYi1jYjdmLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lyp8t3Wh-saarYAyBFQqVy9hxtR4rwYTkSoIGstcJDw=&emci=9d730cee-c37f-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=e697eb2b-cb7f-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=18839602)

body:
Dear Peter,

All hell is breaking loose, and _I'm drawing a line in the sand_.

Liz Cheney, Adam Kinzinger, Adam Schiff, and the rest of the goon squad on the January 6 Committee voted to refer Donald Trump for criminal prosecution.

Now the Biden regime possesses the ammunition it needs to indict Donald Trump and block him from running in 2024.

**This is an all-hands-on-deck emergency for the America First movement,[so please chip in to defend President Trump](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61286326:WZHDwbD3N:m:1:2365227053:B3C3F8EB5BC1188FB797FB282FD4B230:r).**

_In the new Congress, the Republican majority MUST_ :
---
• DEFUND the witch hunt against President Trump • IMPEACH, CONVICT, and REMOVE Joe Biden • IMPEACH, CONVICT, and REMOVE corrupt Attorney General Merrick Garland.
**From the moment Donald Trump began running for president, the establishment schemed to stop him.**

The Clinton campaign, the FBI, and Barack Obama invented the Russian collusion hoax.

Then Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff the Ukraine hoax.

Elon Musk's release of the Twitter Files showed that the FBI rigged the 2020 election by pressuring Twitter to censor the Hunter Biden laptop story.

**None of those coup attempts were enough to derail Trump and America First conservatives.**

Donald Trump announcing his re-election campaign sent the regime into panic mode.

And now the January 6 Committee voting to refer Trump to Biden's Justice Department for prosecution is the regime playing their ace in the hole.

**[Now I must have your help to defend President Trump, so please chip in today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61286326:WZHDwbD3N:m:1:2365227053:B3C3F8EB5BC1188FB797FB282FD4B230:r).** **[JOIN THE FIGHT TO DEFEND TRUMP

clean_body: Dear Peter, All hell is breaking loose, and I'm drawing a line in the sand. Liz Cheney, Adam Kinzinger, Adam Schiff, and the rest of the goon squad on the January 6 Committee voted to refer Donald Trump for criminal prosecution. Now the Biden regime possesses the ammunition it needs to indict Donald Trump and block him from running in 2024. This is an all-hands-on-deck emergency for the America First movement,. I am making it clear right now that in the next Congress, I plan to lead the fight to put an end to the swamp's vendetta against Trump and the MAGA movement. In the new Congress, the Republican majority MUST : • DEFUND the witch hunt against President Trump • IMPEACH, CONVICT, and REMOVE Joe Biden • IMPEACH, CONVICT, and REMOVE corrupt Attorney General Merrick Garland. From the moment Donald Trump began running for president, the establishment schemed to stop him. The Clinton campaign, the FBI, and Barack Obama invented the Russian collusion hoax. Then Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff the Ukraine hoax. Elon Musk's release of the Twitter Files showed that the FBI rigged the 2020 election by pressuring Twitter to censor the Hunter Biden laptop story. None of those coup attempts were enough to derail Trump and America First conservatives. Donald Trump announcing his re-election campaign sent the regime into panic mode. And now the January 6 Committee voting to refer Trump to Biden's Justice Department for prosecution is the regime playing their ace in the hole. . | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | Sincerely, Matt Gaetz (R-FL) | Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz** This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 17, 2021. subject: [Unread] Desperate: RINOs are spamming me to back the Establishment
body:
| | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WrMWXsbFy2hDMfwRYUiyTcVfAqReMQXJIkhsnAAe5DvWReCL6_B1ZKg6zM22h4ePqiIJLmyKhEJs9UT8hftv-R-KDFMMlZqVz16V5hwEFOla1zbUihLt3TdTlimYOUZQbL35MB79TnKeUkKqUoCA9J695i9DOLnbsNf9GeQSEOSHp7LHZ31xboDTwFjK5eTrogBeBCQkZlQ=&c=fz96DcuISG5S5OxcasNbQ8lJJhtiBqTtRUBr5KWyaXfEW9RGBKxgBQ==&ch=usYw0OnTj1KKTh2RJeXg9KYM3fsqJ5I_TZOTbkSvC4HKhNeYUhr9oQ==)
---
| Peter,
Desperate Swamp Insiders have resorted to flooding my office with phone calls, BEGGING me to toe the party line and cast a vote for Kevin McCarthy for Speaker of the House.
It's getting sad at this point...
The Washington Establishment knows that I am not trusting an alligator to Drain the Swamp as our next Speaker of the House.
I prefer my leaders NOT to be owned by the lobbyists!
And even though this Only Kevin crowd SAYS they don't need my vote to anoint Big Tech and Wall Street's favorite "Republican" to the role of Speaker...
Their last-ditch effort to bully me into voting McCarthy tells a different story.
But I won't give in - no matter how much they treat my phone line like Kevin McCarthy treats K Street, I will NOT cave in to the Establishment's demands!
---
| | [HELP ME HOLD THE LINE >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WrMWXsbFy2hDMfwRYUiyTcVfAqReMQXJIkhsnAAe5DvWReCL6_B1ZKg6zM22h4ePqiIJLmyKhEJs9UT8hftv-R-KDFMMlZqVz16V5hwEFOla1zbUihLt3TdTlimYOUZQbL35MB79TnKeUkKqUoCA9J695i9DOLnbsNf9GeQSEOSHp7LHZ31xboDTwFjK5eTrogBeBCQkZlQ=&c=fz96DcuISG5S5OxcasNbQ8lJJhtiBqTtRUBr5KWyaXfEW9RGBKxgBQ==&ch=usYw0OnTj1KKTh2RJeXg9KYM3fsqJ5I_TZOTbkSvC4HKhNeYUhr9oQ==)

| | [DON'T LET THE SWAMP CORONATE McCARTHY >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WrMWXsbFy2hDMfwRYUiyTcVfAqReMQXJIkhsnAAe5DvWReCL6_B1ZKg6zM22h4ePqiIJLmyKhEJs9UT8hftv-R-KDFMMlZqVz16V5hwEFOla1zbUihLt3TdTlimYOUZQbL35MB79TnKeUkKqUoCA9J695i9DOLnbsNf9GeQSEOSHp7LHZ31xboDTwFjK5eTrogBeBCQkZlQ=&c=fz96DcuISG5S5OxcasNbQ8lJJhtiBqTtRUBr5KWyaXfEW9RGBKxgBQ==&ch=usYw0OnTj1KKTh2RJeXg9KYM3fsqJ5I_TZOTbkSvC4HKhNeYUhr9oQ==)

| There is too much at stake for anything less than our 'A Team' right now, Peter.
This is a moment to FIGHT, and Cavin' McCarthy's first instinct is FLIGHT!
We need to be demanding investigations and impeachments for the pain the Regime has caused the American People.
We need to be taking over Pelosi and Cheney's UnSelect Witch Hunt Committee and using it to expose the FEDSURRECTION.
We need to be cutting off every last one of your tax dollars that is blindly being funneled to the Ukraine gravy train!
These are important fights, Peter, in which we can't afford anything less than our most assertive leadership possible.
The Swamp "Republicans" know where I stand on this, and they're BEGGING me to have a change of heart.
Help me show them that MAGA patriots will not be backing down one inch.
[Make sure your party leadership in Washington actually fights for YOUR interests by helping me hold the line and demanding better than a Speaker who sides with Liz Cheney, Big Tech, and the lobbyists!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WrMWXsbFy2hDMfwRYUiyTcVfAqReMQXJIkhsnAAe5DvWReCL6_B1ZKg6zM22h4ePqiIJLmyKhEJs9UT8hftv-R-KDFMMlZqVz16V5hwEFOla1zbUihLt3TdTlimYOUZQbL35MB79TnKeUkKqUoCA9J695i9DOLnbsNf9GeQSEOSHp7LHZ31xboDTwFjK5eTrogBeBCQkZlQ=&c=fz96DcuISG5S5OxcasNbQ8lJJhtiBqTtRUBr5KWyaXfEW9RGBKxgBQ==&ch=usYw0OnTj1KKTh2RJeXg9KYM3fsqJ5I_TZOTbkSvC4HKhNeYUhr9oQ==)

name: Brent Bozell
subject: Elon Musk bought a crime scene
body:
Elon Musk claims his life is in great danger, and I believe he may be right.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0ptqnacm6066gj8dfd80gc00t35laqc473ienm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm2or4cph2bs)
Friend,

Elon Musk claims his life is in great danger -- and I believe he may be right.

Elon recently revealed to the world that a cabal of government and private sector elites are working in unison to influence the elections.

He didn't buy a social media company. He bought a crime scene showing corruption and election interference at the deepest levels of government and society.

21 This is just one example of the unified assault that the government and corporate elites are perpetuating on the American republic through **Big Tech censorship, radical leftwing propagandists in the media, and deep state agents in our government. **

And this is what the Media Research Center (MRC) has been revealing to the public, even before Elon Musk.

My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

**MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.**

And we're going to war against the media to hold them accountable and expose their Deep State corruption.

[_**MRC is raising $15,000 before the New Year, and I need your help. Can you donate $10, $25, $50, or any amount today? Click here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9c5tjre05t0jmhpacmrpq0lji11945466mprfg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm2or4cph2bs)

Now Elon is working to stop this, taking steps like firing Twitter's former deputy general counsel James Bake for suppression of information:
* Elon promised a blitz of internal Twitter documents -- the **Twitter Files** -- starting with the 2020 decision to block users from sharing coverage of Hunter Biden's leaked laptop files.

* Journalist Matt Taibbi shared that Baker had "vetted" the first installment of the **Twitter File** s, then **delayed** the release of the second installment in defiance of Elon's plan.

* Elon found that Baker's "explanation was . . . unconvincing" and promptly fired Baker.

Elon's life is at risk because he is exposing the Deep State Media -- so you and I can prepare for the battle for America's freedom. But this also shows the deep state agents are embedded in American corporations.

[_**Can you send your urgent donation to MRC and help us defeat Big Tech censors? Click here to send your gift today >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeqmpv6cddiqalau7t0fo9e2rculj2jpejoe0mag_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm2or4cph2bs)

How does the Media Research Center expose the left-wing media?

MRC's Newsbuster has a Free Speech division that is solely dedicated to exposing Big Tech censorship. Through MRC's CensorTrack, we have recorded 4,769 instances of Big Tech censorship.

**Our CensorTrack has been used in high profile court cases against the Biden admin. **

MRC has DESTROYED the Media's reputation, but we still have a long way to go.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. **

Friend, it is no exaggeration to say that the fight against the Deep State Media corruption is a fight for America itself. Can you join MRC and help us reach our goal of $15,000 this month?

**Click below to donate.**

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc1ivffupciksbnpacen6hheb9hun7g2blbmk8rg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm2or4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpk88o4ai3muc729ubeglrsv3q8f083g96f5qip0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm2or4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuk89cs9lv08nsmrenl66bp920nf5c73mjfdkojg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm2or4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4kanbn5rficd7u7tkrr2b394t0kunisfdic7ku0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm2or4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zba5n3bbu62tcmnp9aunbdlpjitf9spde62331m0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm2or4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5ti2kgdeo3sujdct324hlb6063rfuc8fe83qpg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm2or4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr74ukdorkght90ua8jrmnsv8tai6jp10et9q5n0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm2or4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $5,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1s45oa0ir26qfsf9k97au8acajn0ut3jm3vu95o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm2or4cph2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z80ug03u2a9sirlf970bvtl5vd8dmek8hc48lgpg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm2or4cph2bs)

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
Founder and President of MRC

name: American Defense News
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zv769943p2clab3q8i6cph8h910ep8crb35ur9i0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm6ob4c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqfo77h756rr5ugccirbmfm1k2584e3o7sotg60o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm6ob4c9h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqo5n6gmhqktgaghmf9re6grqr8mc7cl3035b7kg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm6ob4c9h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zekoruod9ght3182t2nn11dslosu2tonlrrqs6vo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm6ob4c9h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Yaseen Arifin
subject: My generation is counting on you
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | Dear Peter, My name is Yaseen. I’m a ninth grader at Sunset High School and an OLCV Youth Intern. Like many others in my generation, I worry about how climate change will affect my future. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56162377/384090531/-803653937?v=NmgSUw1KyuI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJhNjEyNzJhLWQwN2YtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ki48qJWn3sL6vIahuaPclnhhhGIixi-RBVcdF-4vB08=&emci=da1f0353-8b7d-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=2a61272a-d07f-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=2107230) We’ve all witnessed it first hand over the last couple of years. Wildfires, extreme heat, air that’s too dirty to breathe. A record breaking heat wave that killed over 100 Oregonians. These aren’t just headlines. This is _our_ life. This is _my_ future. Yet despite the ever-increasing impacts of climate change, too many of our elected officials are still not willing to step up and act. That’s why I’m writing you today. **[Will you make a year-end donation to OLCV today to support our work electing leaders who will fight for my future?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56162378/384090532/-1698714710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJhNjEyNzJhLWQwN2YtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ki48qJWn3sL6vIahuaPclnhhhGIixi-RBVcdF-4vB08=&emci=da1f0353-8b7d-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=2a61272a-d07f-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=2107230)** Whatever amount you can give will make a difference. This year, I was proud to work with OLCV to elect Tina Kotek as our next governor. I even appeared in a digital ad supporting her campaign! [(Click here to watch it.)](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56162379/384090533/-803653937?v=NmgSUw1KyuI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJhNjEyNzJhLWQwN2YtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ki48qJWn3sL6vIahuaPclnhhhGIixi-RBVcdF-4vB08=&emci=da1f0353-8b7d-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=2a61272a-d07f-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=2107230) I’m not old enough to vote yet, but if I was I would have voted for Tina because she was the only candidate who will be a champion for our climate and Oregon youth like me. Like most teenagers, I’m really busy with school and many extracurriculars, but I make time to volunteer with OLCV because this work is critical for my future. If we are already experiencing record breaking heat waves, extended periods of triple-digit temperatures, and worsening wildfires, what will it be like in twenty, thirty, fifty years? The next few years are critical. We still have time to address climate change and change the future for my generation and those that come after us. **[Will you donate to OLCV today to ensure that we have the resources to keep fighting for my generation’s future?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56162380/384090534/-1698714710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJhNjEyNzJhLWQwN2YtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ki48qJWn3sL6vIahuaPclnhhhGIixi-RBVcdF-4vB08=&emci=da1f0353-8b7d-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=2a61272a-d07f-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=2107230)** We’re counting on you. Sincerely,
Yaseen Arifin
OLCV Youth Intern |

name: Freedom First Project
subject: Missed Call on Game-Deciding Play Stuns NFL Analysts, Officiating Experts: 'It's Always a Foul'

body:
BREAKING: Jan. 6 committee votes to subpoena Trump!!
| **BREAKING: Jan. 6 committee votes to subpoena Trump**

**FIRST:** The January 6th Committee held their first public hearing to expose Donald Trump's treasonous crimes on Jan. 6th, 2021.

**THEN:** The committee voted to SUBPOENA Donald Trump for his crimes.. _AMAZING!!_

**NOW:** We need to send the Jan. 6th Committee a HUGE thank you note for their brave work.

[**We're sending a HUGE Thank You card to the January 6th Committee and we need your signature! We have 460 more spots open for Democrats in your state to sign - don't wait, sign right now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37695?t=6&akid=5883%2E878179%2EtCoFJI) | [DONATE $5 RIGHT NOW AND SIGN THE THANK YOU LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37695?t=7&akid=5883%2E878179%2EtCoFJI)
---
To: The January 6th Committee
From: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37695?t=8&akid=5883%2E878179%2EtCoFJI) Dear January 6th Committee,

**Thank you** for exposing Donald Trump's involvement in the January 6th attempted insurrection.

**Thank you** for doing what's right and voting unanimously to subpoena Donald Trump.

**Thank you** for spending countless hours combing over evidence to find the truth out that horrific day.

_**You make me proud to be an American.**_

I'm so proud that we have leaders like YOU who are working to give the American people the truth about the attack on our Democracy.

**The bravery you 've shown in standing up for what's right will go down in history. **

Despite the attacks you've endured and the censorship you've received, you've never wavered.

**So thank you. Our country is better because of your leadership.** [**Today, I 'm signing this letter and making a donation to VPP to keep electing leaders like you all.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37695?t=9&akid=5883%2E878179%2EtCoFJI) | [DONATE $5 RIGHT NOW AND SIGN THE THANK YOU LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37695?t=10&akid=5883%2E878179%2EtCoFJI)
---
Sincerely,

A Proud Democrat
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5883%2E878179%2EtCoFJI). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5883%2E878179%2EtCoFJI).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=5883%2E878179%2EtCoFJI) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=5883%2E878179%2EtCoFJI). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=5883%2E878179%2EtCoFJI)

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2v933e4sf91im9c2o5123li54qj504doj6246s0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm6ob4cph2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdkr2fm9jsns0tlfgf3qjacjojs01ab8222vcri0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm6ob4cph2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8741ua8moltc7od5rsps99k99ra4imo4f2hfji0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm6ob4cph2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zndavudrukj8bauu3pbithj9g7vll56aa7d2h5ug_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5jm6ob4cph2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Please take a few moments to share your hopes and priorities in 2023 today. **Here’s a personal survey link:[secure.michaelbennet.com/a/2023-priorities?dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56162613/384091434/645411531?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20221219_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWQ2MmUyYS1kMjdmLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=msOVhx3XTjcJ39RZAH-3hyF-K2weCswgPKrd-ma_R2A=&emci=48d62e2a-d27f-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=49d62e2a-d27f-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=1295540)** Our survey will only take a few minutes, and your responses help Michael plan for the year ahead. Thank you in advance for taking the time! — Team Bennet \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Michael Bennet
Subject: Hi team, how can we help?
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56162614/384091435/645411531?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20221219_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWQ2MmUyYS1kMjdmLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=msOVhx3XTjcJ39RZAH-3hyF-K2weCswgPKrd-ma_R2A=&emci=48d62e2a-d27f-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=49d62e2a-d27f-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=1295540) Hi team, With the final Senate election officially over, I’m looking forward to getting back to work in Washington. We’ve accomplished a lot already — addressing the climate crisis, passing nationwide protections for marriage equality, and investing in our nation’s infrastructure — but our work is far from over. That’s why I am reaching out to key supporters, like you, to see what issues and challenges are on your mind. **I want to make sure your priorities are at the top of my list in the weeks and months ahead.**[**Will you take a few moments to share what’s on your mind in my 2023 Senate Priorities Survey?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56162615/384091436/645411531?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20221219_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWQ2MmUyYS1kMjdmLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=msOVhx3XTjcJ39RZAH-3hyF-K2weCswgPKrd-ma_R2A=&emci=48d62e2a-d27f-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=49d62e2a-d27f-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=1295540) | **[COMPLETE OUR SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56162616/384091437/645411531?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20221219_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWQ2MmUyYS1kMjdmLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=msOVhx3XTjcJ39RZAH-3hyF-K2weCswgPKrd-ma_R2A=&emci=48d62e2a-d27f-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=49d62e2a-d27f-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=1295540)**
---
When you helped re-elect me, you placed your trust in me to speak for you and fight for you in Washington. That’s why it’s so important to me and my team that we know exactly what challenges you’re facing — and what hopes you have for the future.
While I wish I could speak personally with every member of this team, we’ll have to use the next best thing, so my team created this exclusive End of Year Priorities survey. It will take only a minute (two, max!) and couldn’t be more important to our work.
[**We will begin reviewing responses tomorrow morning, so please take our survey by midnight to be one of the first to help shape our 2023 plans →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56162617/384091438/645411531?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20221219_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWQ2MmUyYS1kMjdmLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=msOVhx3XTjcJ39RZAH-3hyF-K2weCswgPKrd-ma_R2A=&emci=48d62e2a-d27f-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=49d62e2a-d27f-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=1295540)
**[COMPLETE OUR SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56162618/384091439/645411531?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20221219_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWQ2MmUyYS1kMjdmLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=msOVhx3XTjcJ39RZAH-3hyF-K2weCswgPKrd-ma_R2A=&emci=48d62e2a-d27f-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=49d62e2a-d27f-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=1295540)**

Michael

subject: please, Derek
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SEAN PATRICK MALONEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Derek, I told you when I launched this campaign that I’ve never backed down from a challenge.

Not when I launched my first race against a Republican incumbent -- and won.

Not when I won reelection while Donald Trump carried my district.

And not when I stepped up to lead House Democrats’ campaign arm during a bruising midterm. [_**Derek, I’m so proud of what our Democrats accomplished this cycle -- even though due to $10 MILLION in Republican attack ads, it cost me my own race. You supported me more than I could have ever imagined, and I was constantly humbled by and grateful for your generosity. That’s why I’m asking just once more: Can you rush in $15 to help me retire the last of my campaign debt? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56163493/384096517/91184225?refcode=20221219_em_fr_b1_spm_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGM0MGZiYi1kNzdmLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6SZNjH5FBWqJ7aR0_c8MYSWjSYhuP5_1fj5TUMt065c=) To be honest, Derek -- I never liked asking you for money. I hate that to compete in an election, it takes hundreds of thousands of dollars. And now, I learned firsthand why it’s tough for regular people to run for office: Taking on campaign debt is almost always necessary to win. [_**Truly, this system is messed up. I’ll keep fighting so real folks can run for office without the fear of financial ruin. But now I’m humbly asking: Will you chip in $15, or whatever you can afford, to help me pay off my final debt? name: Your America
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7653%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=NhK34Ug3kY7canPhf5wKPQ&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97343%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7GvN%2bOB9CSQwj203CXVFWw&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97344%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9jUy5U%2bdLxTYpdaYvMC7Jg&sysid=1)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97344%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9jUy5U%2bdLxTYpdaYvMC7Jg&sysid=1)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7653%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=NhK34Ug3kY7canPhf5wKPQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7653%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=NhK34Ug3kY7canPhf5wKPQ&sysid=1)

body:
The DNC is a year-round organization, making year-round investments to hold the GOP accountable, fight to deliver lasting change for working families, and elect Democrats at all levels of government. | |
---
Derek -- It’s not an exaggeration when we say that the earlier you chip in to the Democratic Party to build a better America, the greater the impact your donation will have. A contribution of even $7 right now gives our party the necessary resources to invest in voter protection, data and technology, and on-the-ground organizing that make all the difference heading into 2023, 2024, and beyond. **Grassroots donations have gone a long way toward powering our party, and with 2022 coming to a close, this is one of your last opportunities to make a difference. Chip in $7 to power our work. Your contribution will have an incredible impact as we continue building the strongest Democratic Party in history.**

A contribution of even $7 right now gives our party the necessary resources to invest in voter protection, data and technology, and on-the-ground organizing that make all the difference heading into 2023, 2024, and beyond. Grassroots donations have gone a long way toward powering our party, and with 2022 coming to a close, this is one of your last opportunities to make a difference. Chip in $7 to power our work.
