name: Trump News HQ
subject: Take the National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztb09mcfis9ojar7fvu6k4s2fqva4t5p1j3ksv90_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5ge0p71cph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfvgbap4bpph1htrqmapsoejm5k9vdnf78aq71k8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5ge0p71cph2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvs8nurcnm8rsgljg6dh4q3ufoks42o9e5ji3mmg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5ge0p71cph2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Action Update (Left Action)
subject: Add your name: Thank Jan 6 Committee for recommending criminal charges against Trump
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
## [Thank 1/6 Committee for recommending Trump face criminal charges](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6da2d11c-f778-4979-86c5-9e755c8c8354/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T99621382-7131-499d-833a-2fe685119df3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _(Already took this action? Forward it to friends so we can maximize the impact! Want to unsubscribe? See link at bottom)_

After a long, thorough and careful investigation, the House Committee investigating the Capitol attack [is recommending](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb54a59a6-ceb9-4dde-844f-7e9003d9fc74/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) the Department of Justice pursue [multiple criminal charges](https://default.salsalabs.org/T719e0911-e5f0-4630-a89e-009d13da9f0b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) against Trump. And based on mountains of evidence, they were right to do so.

**The members were under great political pressure to not recommend charges, and endured threats of violence and even death.** Yet they did the right thing, in spite of this. And that took guts.

[**Please add your name, and thank them for doing the right thing, and recommending charges against Trump.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T52518436-8eb5-4e12-adef-d33ce1027b03/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [SIGN YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T13c1d5d0-a139-4b82-a575-44bdf9d0ed55/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action

|

| Hi there,

My team just sent me the results of our 2023 Priorities Survey, and the hundreds of responses we received from supporters like you will guide my policy agenda for my first term in the U.S. House of Representatives.

I wanted to take a moment to share with you some of the top issues you want to see my team work on: **🌎** Combating climate change**🌎**
**🏨** Safeguarding reproductive rights**🏨**
**🌊** Protecting the Great Lakes**🌊**
**👨👩👧👦** Fixing our broken immigration system**👨👩👧👦** I am excited and ready to get to work on these and many other policy issues impacting Michiganders and all Americans as soon as I am sworn in on January 3.

I also know these problems can’t be solved in a single term – that’s why I’m asking for your support as I lay a strong foundation for my 2024 re-election campaign. [_**Anything you can invest today – even $3 – will allow me to stay focused on the issues during my time in Congress, advocating for the priorities of my district, instead of worrying about fundraising for the next campaign. I wanted to take a moment to share with you some of the top issues you want to see my team work on: 🌎 Combating climate change🌎 🏨 Safeguarding reproductive rights🏨 🌊 Protecting the Great Lakes🌊 👨👩👧👦 Fixing our broken immigration system👨👩👧👦 I am excited and ready to get to work on these and many other policy issues impacting Michiganders and all Americans as soon as I am sworn in on January 3. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: The people have spoken.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | The people have spoken, friend, and they’ve spoken decisively: Together we defended _and expanded_ our Senate majority!

I’m so thankful for every single person who donated, knocked on doors, made calls, and volunteered their time. **That’s how we won here in Georgia, and that’s how we got 51 seats in the Senate.**

The journey to 51 began long before our big win this month. It began by laying the groundwork _years before_ in _every single battleground state._

Now, with experts saying the next cycle will be even tougher than this one, we’ll need to make even bigger investments in our future if we want to keep the Senate out of the hands of Republicans.

**That’s why I’m personally reaching out to you today. The DSCC is setting an ambitious $50,000 goal to ensure that we can prove the critics wrong once again. But right now, they’re coming up short and need your urgent support.

[Please, will you help the DSCC lay the groundwork for 2024 with a $5 donation? What we do now could make all the difference >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/10052?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221219-RaphaelWarnock-PostElectionFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221219-RaphaelWarnock-PostElectionFR-Pros-sl1&akid=9217%2E9716520%2EK78Su5)**

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: Happy Holidays!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | Friend,

I want to wish you and your family a happy holiday season and a hopeful New Year. This year, I am particularly grateful for my supporters, like you, who have helped send me back to Congress to continue to make a difference for the hardworking people of New Jersey.

Thank you for being a part of my team and helping me to continue fighting for hardworking families, bipartisan progress, and more. I am confident we will continue this impactful work in 2023 and beyond and deliver real results to the American people.

I hope you get the love, comfort, and rest you deserve after all your hard work this year. Enjoy a merry and bright holiday season.

Yours,

Josh
---
|
---

* * *

subject: Panel refers Trump on criminal charges
body:

clean_body: we need to know your thoughts on the Jan. 6th Committee before the first hearing begins: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | When: Where: | The January 6th Committee is expected to make an announcement on who they will be criminally referring to the Justice Department in just a few hours. So We must know if you plan on watching the new January 6th Committee Public Hearing today. | | | Thanks for your response, \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . name: Our Revolution
subject: Tell Senate leadership: reject Manchin's dirty deal!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Twice, Our Revolution launched massive
pressure campaigns big enough to overcome the best efforts of Joe Manchin
and the fossil fuel industry's work to pass an environmentally disastrous
dirty deal to expand carbon extraction permitting.

But our fight is not over because Democratic leadership has indicated it
may push to pass the dirty deal by including it in must-pass legislation
to keep our government running. That's why it's critical we make our
voices heard right now.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7641?source=OR_EM_EN_30SP_20221219_1_1&t=1011&akid=3836%2E5885482%2E9MQ3u8 ]Click here to call your Senator and urge them to reject Joe Manchin's
Dirty Deal.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7641?source=OR_EM_EN_30SP_20221219_1_1&t=1012&akid=3836%2E5885482%2E9MQ3u8 ][IMG]

Our Revolution's targeted campaign helped kill Manchin's dirty deal twice,
and our members made thousands of calls pressuring lawmakers.

With lobbyists rushing to convince Democratic Senators to back the dirty
deal again, it’s critical to show them just how many of us oppose
Manchin’s selfish push to fast-track fossil fuels and gut protections for
frontline communities.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7641?source=OR_EM_EN_30SP_20221219_1_1&t=1013&akid=3836%2E5885482%2E9MQ3u8 ]Can we count on you to call your Senator?

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Great America Update
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7515%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=2hclqERGuAT%2ftV3MoM56OQ&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77495%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zqObHw2L1lMguqPi29lzuw&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77496%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VhAcrOHAhzpeu4ZSw2bMFg&sysid=1)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77496%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VhAcrOHAhzpeu4ZSw2bMFg&sysid=1)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7515%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=2hclqERGuAT%2ftV3MoM56OQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7515%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=2hclqERGuAT%2ftV3MoM56OQ&sysid=1)

| Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade yet... now everyone wants a pair
---
[ ](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJx1UU1vrSAU_DW608DBwu3CRT_SLpp-3b7ktStyFLzSiFrFevvvezC33ZUACTNz5sBgSy4VL6RSjKemRImNNakrgQFw4OdcCiZUvuPQ7AQjKahqp1hSMOvRdTnyFadpGHxeDz5tSwFix5pCVucMUAoORaWkagQqVoGSPO3KNoRxTsRFAjc013XNW4uT6w8ZOpOh-XS1jW5EGlqVnYM-KTQpZo1NwyBWixusQyKuL67-sTgKpUDQIQG5BK_nYZlqS3zweIK8NW7xBJGH6xwGeyJq9CO6Q0_UMmvba-x0i6h_dZpMIpLhMTPDUnWECKb_aD2SwM2tnbQzZPl__9Nm6IPt450p3CKGTITuu031XrzcPx_3r3fHDWzprYSacV8_-cGkU2nG1XXkKxXlf9jyj6nT1TvXfJWJukwAtjLyjQHDx9vqp-Xd391mj2-YfcgHfxZJuKI9fI32V3kyybdvjai6_gbWmKgA)
Ever heard the saying, "good things come in small packages?"

Well, it's certainly true for the latest breakthrough in hearing tech: a device that packs an extraordinary amount of power into a truly tiny design.

Two years ago, our engineers unveiled the virtually invisible Horizon hearing aids and it quickly became a best-seller. Now, they're back with yet another innovation—Horizon AX—and experts are calling it**the biggest upgrade in sound and speech clarity the industry has ever seen.**
[ ](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJx1UcFOxCAU_Jr21gYeteweelg168FEzcZEPZG3QLeY0nZbatWv99Gs3iRAwsy8eTDYipeSF6WUjKemwhJra1JXAQPgwLe8FEzIfMOh3ghGUpDHjWRJwaxH1-bIFxzHvve57n3aVEwIAGalMVwXXG91WWy5JbWogQlWpG3VhDBMidglsKe5LEveWBxdd8rQmQzNh9M2uhFpaB3tFNRFoUgxKaxrBrFa7FGHRNzubp5ZHIWUIOiQQDkHr6Z-HrUlPni8QN4aN3uCyMO1DoO9EBr9gO7UETVPynYKW9Ugqj-dIpOIZPiZmX4-toQIpv5pPZDATY0dlTNk-XL4bdN3wXbxzhRuEUMmQnXtqhrPr8_f8BLkaQUbeiuhZjjoJ9-bdKzMsLiWfEtJ-Z_W_GPqdPXW1V9VIq8TgLWMfGPAcH5b_Di_-_u77PENs3P54K8iCTe0h6_B_ikvJvn6rRGVtz-EpaiD)
**The big upgrade:** Horizon AX has the world's first-ever dual processing system, meaning it has not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips. And with double the power comes double the clarity...
[ Check if you qualify ](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJx1UU1vhCAU_DV60_Dhij142HazTdqkbTZNmvZCnoArjairWLv_vg9jeysBAjPzBhhMSXNBs1wIQmNdQg610bEtGWGMMnpDc064SAvK6oITlDJRFYJEGTEObJsCXWAc-96lqndxU3JOs9qom0JXrOaFoLgslChMXkG225G4LRvvhyni-4gdsS_LkjYGRtudE7A6Af1llQluSGoclZm83BQSFZOEuiYsVPMjKB_xw_7ulYSWCcE4biKWz97JqZ9HZZD3DjbIGW1nhxB62NaCNxuhwA1gzx1S8yRNJ6GVDYD800k0CUgC34nu56pFhBP5z9EDCuzUmFFajZZvp99j-s6bLtwZw81CyEjIrl1VD5fv-1v4GD9fVrDBtyKqh5N6cb2Ox1IPi23RNxeY_3nNP6SOV29tfS0jcRsxtpahbwiYXd4XN86f7vE-eX6H5JI_uV0g2R3O_jqYP-Vmkq7fGlBx-AF1lakN)
Unlocking the power of two

Lead Audiologist, Dr. Hope Lanter, explains: "We haven't seen an innovation like this in decades. **The Horizon AX is the new gold standard for anyone who cares about speech clarity in conversation, especially in noisy environments."**

"I encourage all of my patients to try these devices and experience the sound quality for themselves, because there's truly nothing like it." **And with the 45-day trial and money-back guarantee, there's really no reason not to.**

You might be a good candidate for the Horizon AX if you meet the following criteria:

name: Claudia Tenney
subject: slandered...smeared...shadowbanned—still fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
At midnight on election day, I was ahead of my Democrat opponent by nearly 30,000 votes... [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0212%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=SSGtsiWItMqAcMVP58X2Ig&sysid=1)
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43139%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j%2fj8jkwDx6GmYDbNQeAbeg&sysid=1)
---
| | Friend, I’m Claudia Tenney -- I’m a _small business owner_ , _Marine mom_ , and _conservative congresswoman_ from New York. I’m also heading up the _Election Integrity Caucus_ , a position I was uniquely qualified for due to the events surrounding my 2020 election race. I was involved in a **100-DAY LONG** post-election recount and legal battle. At midnight of election day, I was ahead of my Democrat opponent by _**NEARLY 30,000 VOTES!**_
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43130%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wzFFvJ%2fSdDl7E%2bR3IVMYyA&sysid=1)
---
| | Even with outstanding absentee ballots, my opponent’s chance for victory was slim.
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43130%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wzFFvJ%2fSdDl7E%2bR3IVMYyA&sysid=1)
---
| Over the next 90 days, we fought against a team of lawyers who abused the legal system and tried to cherry-pick ballots and play games in NY-22. They pulled out every shady tactic in the book to try to push my opponent ahead.
---
| | Eventually, the New York Supreme Court got involved and conducted a thorough, transparent, and fair review to all parties. **After every ballot had been scrutinized and every legal vote had counted, I was declared and certified the winner by a slim** _**123**_**votes! ****

** **That didn’t stop my opponent or Nancy Pelosi from trying to overturn the results of my race and undermine me at every turn. ** I decided that day that I never want what happened to me to happen to another candidate again, I was going to lead on reforming, securing, and auditing our election system.
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43130%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wzFFvJ%2fSdDl7E%2bR3IVMYyA&sysid=1)
---
That means implementing common-sense reforms such as: ** ➡️ Mandatory Voter IDs** ** ➡️ Banning Ballot Harvesting** ** ➡️ Preventing Unsolicited Ballots** And foremost, ensuring our elections are: **FREE ✅ FAIR ✅ACCURATE ✅ TRANSPARENT ✅** For leading this fight, I’ve been constantly attacked: **Slandered by the Radical Left ...** **Smeared by the Mainstream Media...** **Shadowbanned by Big Tech ...****

** But I will not be intimidated. I will not be silenced. And I will never back down. That’s because I’m fighting to take back New York, I’m fighting to save America, and I’m fighting for you, Friend! **Friend, they wouldn’t be attacking me if I weren’t effective in this fight --**[**a fight that I hope you’ll consider supporting with a small donation today!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43131%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=S5IWXoVPGbM3Kdlp0n02fg&sysid=1) Thank you, Claudia Tenney
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43130%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wzFFvJ%2fSdDl7E%2bR3IVMYyA&sysid=1)
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| Paid for by Claudia for Congress |

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0212%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=SSGtsiWItMqAcMVP58X2Ig&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0212%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=SSGtsiWItMqAcMVP58X2Ig&sysid=1)

name: Linda Skaggs
subject: Betrayed by Biden for following Trump's orders
body:
Joe Biden betrayed my son.
Dear friend,

Joe Biden betrayed my son.

Chad was a U.S. Marshal defending the Federal Courthouse in Portland, Oregon, during the violent summer riots of 2020.

But instead of rewarding Chad for bravely putting his life on the line to protect life and property, the Biden administration is allowing his life to be destroyed.

And now I’m afraid he’ll lose everything...**[which is why I’m reaching out to you today to help my son.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9qu5s8qg0080dmdj1uhbv3iim9305j84ssvte7g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ei37d9h6uon79hnmmrq3d9hm4pjf9hi6kq36opgctgeepb361j64o34sdj69ob7slonbdumeuqn4thl6nh125olk9ah74p5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskap69bhemrtcd1lm1q39dpjmnh60oj2chh68p77q88he5uhik8p24onq6b554qgav95a4snq1a1b8ahae8t7cejm8gq48bi4bh28or7chgm1pb1cpgm49fg)**

That’s my son, Chad Skaggs, his wife Roxana and my three beautiful grandkids.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8dqfu4mes8cduijfiq7gfc5iu2ce5q438927d2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5geaob6c5h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj791jmkojfcbjkorrbdt1mkor2cpnkop3ad1jcco6eo77clhj0pj2c1ie6pj4s5juasblmvb7fdbieoqjbogh2saq4l8jicin2tdnqmqj2d5lemqua5cj4lonbdum6gqr0t1kmsprboj0c9h68oj4cjjt448n2v8pa4ch2cbt35iiid85fkil2ebt0l0lk58l74ejm79r3kti4no)

At the height of the 2020 riots, President Trump sent Chad and his fellow Marshals to restore law and order in Portland--because the local and state authorities refused to stop the riots.

A violent left-wing mob blocked the Courthouse doors to trap Chad and his fellow Marshals inside.

**Then they set the building on fire.**

Thank God he escaped.

But outside--as the city burned around them--Chad and his fellow officers were pelted with rocks, frozen water bottles, and Molotov cocktail-style firebombs.

Eventually, the Marshals were able to disperse the mob restore law and order.

What happened next is shocking... and left my son and his family devastated.

**Leftist rioters brought a civil lawsuit against Chad.**

After escaping the burning Courthouse, Chad and his fellow Marshals tried to move the rioters away from the building.

One of the Marshals was forced to use his baton and pepper spray on the violent leftists who refused orders to disperse.

Video evidence shows minimal force was used against the mob. And remember, this was a group of radicals who tried to _**kill** _these federal officers--and then refused commands to back away.

All summer they were chanting slogans like _"all cops are bastards"_ and _"pigs must die."_

Still, the left-wing American Civil Liberties Union (ACLU) jumped at the chance to sue Chad on behalf of the radical rioters.

President Trump was also named in the lawsuit, along with other officials and law enforcement officers.

With a lawsuit against a law enforcement officer, the government typically provides an attorney and legal resources for the officer.

**But Biden’s DOJ said it was _"not in the interest of the United States" _to defend Chad in court.**

**Joe Biden chose the rioters over my son.**

Chad was home recovering from hip surgery for an injury he sustained when they came to his house asking for his gun and his badge...

I know that Chad is being thrown to the wolves for purely political reasons.

And I know that Joe Biden is making a statement by turning his back on the law enforcement officers like Chad because they were sent into Portland by President Trump.

Let’s be honest, the leftist base of Joe Biden’s party hates the police.

They want people like Chad to suffer.

They know he can’t afford to pay for a legal defense for himself.

They know he will be financially destroyed and his family will be destitute.

But they want to make an example out of him.

And so I’d resigned myself to thinking that there was nothing I could do and that the bad guys were going to win.

Until we got the phone call that changed everything.

It was Jason from LELDF saying they would help provide a free legal defense for Chad.

**[Believe me, your kind donation today of $35, $50, or $100 to LELDF to defend Chad will mean so much to our family.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc6313nj7ao0dnnsbqg6b124ir0j1tipc7go08ug_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ei37d9h6uon79hnmmrq3d9hm4pjf9hi6kq36opgctgeepb361j64o34sdj69ob7slonbdumeuqn4thl6nh125olk9ah74p5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskap69bhemrtcd1lm1q39dpjmnh60oj2chh68p77q88he5uhik8p24onq6b554qgav95a4snq1a1b8ahae8t7cejm79r3kti46h22sh2s8i66pr4c5geaob6c5h2bs)**

Friend, I can’t emphasize enough that my son never asked for any of this!

After more than 14 years in the Army as a Green Beret, Chad has served with distinction for the past 11 years in the U.S. Marshal Service.

And this is the “thanks” he gets from the Commander-in-Chief: **betrayal and retaliation.**

**[LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Chad’s case, so I’m counting on your gift of $35 or more today to help fund his defense.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5kuvfjkdojncj368a181mouj2em4kv1sbnhnteg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5geaob6c5h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj791jmkojfcbjkorrbdt1mkor2cpnkop3ad1jcco6eo77clhj0pj2c1ie6pj4s5juasblmvb7fdbieoqjbogh2saq4l8jicin2tdnqmqj2d5lemqua5cj4lonbdum6gqr0t1kmsprboj0c9h68oj4cjjt448n2v8pa4ch2cbt35iiid85fkil2ebt0l0lk58l74ejm79r49fg)**

Whether or not you can give, please keep Chad and our family in your prayers.

With deep appreciation,

Linda Skaggs

P.S. I know in my heart that most Americans are good people who support law enforcement and don’t want to see my son Chad destroyed for simply doing his job. Please consider taking a stand for what’s right today by helping my son by clicking this link: **[https://secure.anedot.com/leldf/cb2008faac55b0a983ae2](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3k4tvqkckav6bfhggtejgqdruaj0pda1grdrip8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ei37d9h6uon79hnmmrq3d9hm4pjf9hi6kq36opgctgeepb361j64o34sdj69ob7slonbdumeuqn4thl6nh125olk9ah74p5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskap69bhemrtcd1lm1q39dpjmnh60oj2chh68p77q88he5uhik8p24onq6b554qgav95a4snq1a1b8ahae8t7cejm79r48d245p25oh4cdjm8ob0slgmcob24no)**
\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we’re defending, please visit**www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_© Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303
_

body:
Happy Holidays from our family to yours! | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56166097/384109071/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjhmMTM3Zi1lODdmLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mScBZ2I9xQ3zcwIGpMYhV51WKwSu0Ku1740R9Gzj2Ok=&emci=d3b636f8-bb7f-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=a28f137f-e87f-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=43402272) | Peter, **Happy Holidays from our family to yours!** During this special time of year, it’s important that we all take time to reflect and relax with our loved ones. I hope your holidays are peaceful and your final days of 2022 are bright!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56166098/384109072/137396421?refcode=E19820-20221219-HappyHolidays-graphic-Holiday-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjhmMTM3Zi1lODdmLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mScBZ2I9xQ3zcwIGpMYhV51WKwSu0Ku1740R9Gzj2Ok=) Yesterday, we kicked off the first night of Chanukah, an eight day Jewish holiday celebrating the human spirit. _Chanukah reminds all of us the value of perseverance in the face of adversity._ As I think back on all that our state and our nation have endured over the past few years, _I’m reminded that we are strongest when we stand together for a common purpose._ My Jewish heritage is extremely important to me. As the granddaughter of a Holocaust victim, I learned from a young age what can happen when we turn away from one another. Growing up, my father instilled in me the importance of social justice and the need to look out for one another – which ultimately pushed me to go into public service in Vermont. **Our state represents the best of America** : Hardworking people who care for each other. When the challenges we face seem daunting, the spirit of the people of this brave little state always brings me renewed energy and optimism. I’m grateful for Vermont, I am grateful for our communities, and I am grateful for you. Wishing you peace, joy, and hope this holiday season. Becca Balint

**Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room.** As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she's led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. clean_body: Happy Holidays from our family to yours! | | Peter, Happy Holidays from our family to yours! During this special time of year, it’s important that we all take time to reflect and relax with our loved ones. I hope your holidays are peaceful and your final days of 2022 are bright! = Yesterday, we kicked off the first night of Chanukah, an eight day Jewish holiday celebrating the human spirit. Chanukah reminds all of us the value of perseverance in the face of adversity. As I think back on all that our state and our nation have endured over the past few years, I’m reminded that we are strongest when we stand together for a common purpose. My Jewish heritage is extremely important to me. As the granddaughter of a Holocaust victim, I learned from a young age what can happen when we turn away from one another. Growing up, my father instilled in me the importance of social justice and the need to look out for one another – which ultimately pushed me to go into public service in Vermont. Our state represents the best of America : Hardworking people who care for each other. When the challenges we face seem daunting, the spirit of the people of this brave little state always brings me renewed energy and optimism. I’m grateful for Vermont, I am grateful for our communities, and I am grateful for you. Wishing you peace, joy, and hope this holiday season. Becca Balint Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room. As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she's led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. subject: Elon Musk bought a crime scene
body:
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b70321263dd4e0daef910c30c89a924&_e=Dwubve2SJoxFybcR-uxHDnOpvZV5X_PgSKjdkAd3_qnXD5yKrNqDPEXD7AWVOFxCbX8TmPe4Wf7C44zIfapZ82NE4fLbLamVG9Rx8uemaaKI_XsALfiMlRvYvx1O8Vu6MUi_hKlwwPFKeup_t4BwVg6iY1L3RMbjumbQAtbkH-kTLCTVf3yGV8lckLGUxO3d1Ifzt1yQjNodxjfUfonFN-DKwIWXBGqmQofv7JfcVFaZKiu8IiTqe31-WdTYJutlI6aTaiqH7-shOfMLq3_Kvw%3D%3D)
Friend,

Elon Musk claims his life is in great danger -- and I believe he may be right.

Elon recently revealed to the world that a cabal of government and private sector elites are working in unison to influence the elections.

He didn't buy a social media company. He bought a crime scene showing corruption and election interference at the deepest levels of government and society.

This is just one example of the unified assault that the government and corporate elites are perpetuating on the American republic through **Big Tech censorship, radical leftwing propagandists in the media, and deep state agents in our government. **

And this is what the Media Research Center (MRC) has been revealing to the public, even before Elon Musk.

My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

**MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.**

And we're going to war against the media to hold them accountable and expose their Deep State corruption.

[_**MRC is raising $15,000 before the New Year, and I need your help. Can you donate $10, $25, $50, or any amount today? Click here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b70321263dd4e0daef910c30c89a924&_e=Dwubve2SJoxFybcR-uxHDnOpvZV5X_PgSKjdkAd3_qnXD5yKrNqDPEXD7AWVOFxCbX8TmPe4Wf7C44zIfapZ82NE4fLbLamVG9Rx8uemaaKI_XsALfiMlRvYvx1O8Vu6b1OMvO85rvTRxg6-HPb4b-Xd9tymaRkHbVUEF_7SkXgVs9XQ-PiB0_Tymq90poYQh0PyNaQ6AE2IP2fNwAniY4pZtSlNA6vbBOdfiqGNlw18QmDJtV9CdZwMAiydAo9wZ9JC8mdGF54HuOd_YXUvYA%3D%3D)

Now Elon is working to stop this, taking steps like firing Twitter's former deputy general counsel James Bake for suppression of information:
* Elon promised a blitz of internal Twitter documents -- the **Twitter Files** -- starting with the 2020 decision to block users from sharing coverage of Hunter Biden's leaked laptop files.

* Journalist Matt Taibbi shared that Baker had "vetted" the first installment of the **Twitter File** s, then **delayed** the release of the second installment in defiance of Elon's plan.

* Elon found that Baker's "explanation was . . . unconvincing" and promptly fired Baker.

Elon's life is at risk because he is exposing the Deep State Media -- so you and I can prepare for the battle for America's freedom. But this also shows the deep state agents are embedded in American corporations.

[_**Can you send your urgent donation to MRC and help us defeat Big Tech censors? Click here to send your gift today >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b70321263dd4e0daef910c30c89a924&_e=Dwubve2SJoxFybcR-uxHDnOpvZV5X_PgSKjdkAd3_qnXD5yKrNqDPEXD7AWVOFxCbX8TmPe4Wf7C44zIfapZ82NE4fLbLamVG9Rx8uemaaKI_XsALfiMlRvYvx1O8Vu6WC6ZrtjAfkqgNoI2QJHVi17WKDZYFpO28ZhrQB39BWk3BDxTSslJtLDp4WzojUU0yNlubUjmiIB8KkTprMCPBZ-nS-H0NOS6Xw9l0527E_tUZFdxH5zwIlPE62090BtFVog5dtqKHiyGk4qUZy2-Eg%3D%3D)

How does the Media Research Center expose the left-wing media?

MRC's Newsbuster has a Free Speech division that is solely dedicated to exposing Big Tech censorship. Through MRC's CensorTrack, we have recorded 4,769 instances of Big Tech censorship.

**Our CensorTrack has been used in high profile court cases against the Biden admin. **

MRC has DESTROYED the Media's reputation, but we still have a long way to go.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. **

Friend, it is no exaggeration to say that the fight against the Deep State Media corruption is a fight for America itself. Can you join MRC and help us reach our goal of $15,000 this month?

clean_body: Friend, Elon Musk claims his life is in great danger -- and I believe he may be right. Elon recently revealed to the world that a cabal of government and private sector elites are working in unison to influence the elections. He didn't buy a social media company. He bought a crime scene showing corruption and election interference at the deepest levels of government and society. This is just one example of the unified assault that the government and corporate elites are perpetuating on the American republic through Big Tech censorship, radical leftwing propagandists in the media, and deep state agents in our government. And this is what the Media Research Center (MRC) has been revealing to the public, even before Elon Musk. My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies. And we're going to war against the media to hold them accountable and expose their Deep State corruption. Now Elon is working to stop this, taking steps like firing Twitter's former deputy general counsel James Bake for suppression of information: Elon promised a blitz of internal Twitter documents -- the Twitter Files -- starting with the 2020 decision to block users from sharing coverage of Hunter Biden's leaked laptop files. Journalist Matt Taibbi shared that Baker had "vetted" the first installment of the Twitter File s, then delayed the release of the second installment in defiance of Elon's plan. Elon found that Baker's "explanation was . . . unconvincing" and promptly fired Baker. Elon's life is at risk because he is exposing the Deep State Media -- so you and I can prepare for the battle for America's freedom. But this also shows the deep state agents are embedded in American corporations. How does the Media Research Center expose the left-wing media? MRC's Newsbuster has a Free Speech division that is solely dedicated to exposing Big Tech censorship. Through MRC's CensorTrack, we have recorded 4,769 instances of Big Tech censorship. Our CensorTrack has been used in high profile court cases against the Biden admin. MRC has DESTROYED the Media's reputation, but we still have a long way to go. When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. Friend, it is no exaggeration to say that the fight against the Deep State Media corruption is a fight for America itself. Can you join MRC and help us reach our goal of $15,000 this month? Click below to donate.** Thank you, Brent Bozell Founder and President of MRC The mission of the Media Research Center is to create a media culture in America where truth and liberty flourish. | | Dear Friend, There's this notion nowadays that just because an idea is popular, it must be true.

It's a narrative that you'll often see pushed by a dysfunctional media or toxic culture. And as long as the idea is considered "correct" by the "right" people like TV talking heads, celebrities, or the masses on social media, the general public believes it.

That's why the Libertas Institute published this eBook in our Tuttle Twins series: **[_The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths._](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e25efc33a6aa4a369dbad547630a0aa2&_e=D4BrX3EPtWjB6f88DowiP3rEIBvKJngxDnYC09_iombuQuwF5p2vkDi_W9FWkqe9F2stFUC59vOmT7iR1rMJNfEObtg24YiYNLUDK6PgItT2geaxup5tlqyE4QenNT5VDM8i5LpghwTTR-qnURm3Mx4Xj8Pjb2Z8ivN31936QxLwjuB5HXp8sjZwmzb7KbgLNQr_BgvjuD2cty_w6aRbNswgkXcnFDOPfmyV59rfwvdbPEQXAfUHDZM8lepy7o0KyjPBLuEI8cLnrHrWmGG9WdOItAkhZ64ij2KqdkC6kgV4exB5gjwMt3IWVa_Ee_1GECASQq_Iu0k_YbSGHTs0AdOVeKGPGeGCjrtdKjaigAgY6w9skUxz52dDgNJGJ3ot)**

* Overpopulation is destroying the world
* Global climate change can be reversed by law

| Peter,

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8ner2eipt74eimbakpadv69e5di4ahd9pc4fl20_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5ge9o30cjh2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znc143hb7q399d74dprlu0upko9n8vaiteqojfko_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5ge9o30cjh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjmpp38vs6qgpmfbgajc0do5d8avghmem2u54vt8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5ge9o30cjh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8ehpMgz1iGk1B8pPHK4R661kLEqRFhoSI_b-pBNYi5Pv3x_hR-bG4UlT2ko2ocYGToAitEzB7NmdNkIh89wcFk3ad6AvMePpYBINI_JWoUsk7KT_THo2AZcIw8kuAC3dwBHn3EDLPa0nq_AZNEk1O7FuzWvTCqQMnrjRHy_LRTsZ6LAVOtXUtKgFgmF7k3YVoTOpBspwm-JuDKEkxgIwoJbSvv6-nILL00RWfiuIozYGbkmKBPjbPPVL5vOZZD1LNXdtqj-GoiDnrEWBmAVpcS4FH18ztgPgmgf8BKwKS64mFtp6knDWloZNbEnIl8nTPzi9qx6PWpiW1zmci4F3pqs/3s4/hPYZ8M4RT8mkuw0bobM5GQ/h0/QQlSu78zFJWFaKUeNNbpuDixa2iud9ebKoIBE-c57uM)
| | Peter,

The team here at The Collective PAC wanted to reach out personally and thank you for supporting our work leading up to the 2022 midterm elections.

**Having grassroots supporters like you on our team is what made all the difference on Election Day and what will make all the difference in 2024 and beyond.**

Because of you, we can continue our work to elect Black leaders to every level of government and build Black political power across the country.

In times like these, America needs strong Black leaders like our candidates more than ever.

[You’ve heard from us a lot over the past year, but now, we want to hear from you. Take our survey now to let us know where you think we should be focusing our efforts moving forward »](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmVfla2dNuK6ftw4XGMkguURADb0EjutA4M4EKyzpxkYF0ZrSqYBrx6hbUvDd9hLKIN5XyhE0GJm_MPO5NwsV_scke4pcdbjsICJDzrv34iwKQBzeDbS3QhafrWvVmTISscvaA2ht3vWzZ_MGBWU5oIzZ_zmmuX-Sp1M0HfBtcACx6LrVGSIEIHs9FOoCdRbh44gA549M-tdFNCKeJ6jJajnQ0f1lhEFl_2WbU3TOlnfEqom7A9D_j7Lq7QWqGJzVLkPAgRlatN4SyE_d1bLoGbUJBmaGIHFHAePmknv6gWpIlsQotDjNN3QE7vtozqIB4/3s4/hPYZ8M4RT8mkuw0bobM5GQ/h1/AcMUh065uVoPDiW_u1VX5_7ajNXdwOWaVnUpgeEKuYM)
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY »](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmVfla2dNuK6ftw4XGMkguURADb0EjutA4M4EKyzpxkYF0ZrSqYBrx6hbUvDd9hLKIN5XyhE0GJm_MPO5NwsV_scke4pcdbjsICJDzrv34iwEle1_DG4TciYKvm37yG9denhaJ0Vp8ztC3DZke_ZfsWvkBmo1BWg3maSBhFqMzYCKvtgUmyTLSY9pkR73WlkAe3wP7O_pvaTlDNrihY1ONYR9jtBQFOd-tBXRIPoBTreo6NN06nKtW6kqTbQWDwN4xpZ01z4a2u_g-_wODyLU7XSzPJ38E1ZTO9wp-u1i_6WsamimeRae5jcG6bvtjmxGg/3s4/hPYZ8M4RT8mkuw0bobM5GQ/h2/bmlHEDDD4O35RfAbM7nECJIcaflmXzMjZR3NSBpEGxc)

Thank you again for your continued support of The Collective PAC. Supporters like you are critical to achieving our mission, and we can’t wait to see what we continue to accomplish with you on our team.

— The Collective PAC

P.S. Before you go, don’t forget to [take our survey](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmVfla2dNuK6ftw4XGMkguURADb0EjutA4M4EKyzpxkYF0ZrSqYBrx6hbUvDd9hLKIN5XyhE0GJm_MPO5NwsV_scke4pcdbjsICJDzrv34iwO-YxRbsHXzlnktDUDDUAXs0RQJDvjmasKNR_dGYqJRGXtQts3lUFc3hnZEXBoWepbS_gl54A6snLq5VwPAcow6o2EZSVpC-TuzdKD6kRifsYDnr6HAnAsyfzwWsfHdDrTXnAaiOOJ8cXyXlmnFwP3RIu0LSW238QrLXSiJTp2AaUZMXExJrdUqgG8DdTcNY3wWFjxMjXIrrrLH73-xYass/3s4/hPYZ8M4RT8mkuw0bobM5GQ/h3/2RF7MTlSWj8bEXMKFfGdK7jB0gsh3uCdymo7_UONxOw)!

* * *

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5O3Wwmdygae0W-34efSvb_hfX51xtIkq_nCgr0tl8iQevwRMX83U0D_H1tdhXt-56KpcN7E4vZugrz6PQ7SabCPYBrbRqQx-ug21lP7AhCE1MLB7yL0oeA8el0keiiRin2q2zS8uJWMFCweJzcOQ6eMB_Zw-b2JkpZLLMxJ1bLh6DPXU46dH4E7MkMK1ivQhfFvnYmMvcWN7OAo7a8mG3fOk24s1t_mXQcNMuCXXgLpltrjNdeczjxIsvNCOPUBOSnNF8f7YgrXM50F8GXZ1nAGHJLzNDls-2kvhFCPT0lYizyeOxThUbFaPgEuTYViIKQklenMT5l5owb2miOY4B/3s4/hPYZ8M4RT8mkuw0bobM5GQ/h4/F5LX_fsIh71G46vmWJMUDNtTkLfamNvDVDNxzAQC1Ok) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, The team here at The Collective PAC wanted to reach out personally and thank you for supporting our work leading up to the 2022 midterm elections. Having grassroots supporters like you on our team is what made all the difference on Election Day and what will make all the difference in 2024 and beyond. Because of you, we can continue our work to elect Black leaders to every level of government and build Black political power across the country. In times like these, America needs strong Black leaders like our candidates more than ever. | | Thank you again for your continued support of The Collective PAC. Supporters like you are critical to achieving our mission, and we can’t wait to see what we continue to accomplish with you on our team. — The Collective PAC P.S. Before you go, don’t forget to ! The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1472%2E5257348%2EVc7qD8 ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek,

Today, the House takes one of its final actions to bring the facts of the
insurrection before the American people, before Republicans take over the
majority at the start of the next Congress in January and disband the
effort.

But we’re not here to talk about that.

We’re here to talk about holding Kevin McCarthy and the Republican Party
accountable.

That obligation doesn’t end after this Congress. It only becomes more
important.

McCarthy and the Republican leadership have shown time and again that they
will abandon their responsibility to uphold and defend the Constitution if
it’s politically convenient.

And the attacks on those who have defended the Constitution are gearing
up. Look at this one from this morning:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=dec2022_abs_em.XWEzUA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221219_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1004&akid=1472%2E5257348%2EVc7qD8 ]Donald J. Trump @realDonaldTrump The highly partisan Unselect Committee is
illegally leaking confidential info to anyone that will listen. Adam 'Shifty'
Schiff is all over T.V. talking about Criminal Referrals, just like he was on
the Russia, Russia, Russia Hoax, which turned out to be the con of the century.
How much longer are Republicans, and American Patriots in general, going to
allow this to happen. These are the Criminals who spied on my campaign, cheated
on the Election, lied to FISA Court & Congress. They are SICK!

That’s why it’s so important that you stand with Adam today as the
political attacks from Trump, Fox News, and the GOP reach a fever pitch.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=dec2022_abs_em.XWEzUA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221219_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1005&akid=1472%2E5257348%2EVc7qD8 ]Add $10 of support to Adam’s campaign and stand with him today against
the onslaught of GOP attacks that are sure to come. We rely on this team
to have his back and help us respond as quickly as possible.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

body:
The Electoral Count Reform Act would help close the loopholes Trump attempted to exploit [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56159724/384079995/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzcyMjdmYi1jNjdmLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UKnsMHdasDKT6SBUpDiTsR7p9reAcnLEwSXs2J2IkBY=&emci=3ad4f52f-577d-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=477227fb-c67f-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

We're quickly approaching the two year anniversary of the January 6 insurrection. After months of Donald Trump peddling his "Big Lie," a violent pro-Trump mob stormed our nation's Capitol building as Kim and her colleagues met to certify the results of the 2020 presidential election.

In the time following this attack on our democracy, not enough has been done to prevent an event like this from ever happening again. **That's why Kim and her colleagues in Congress are working to pass the Electoral Count Reform Act to defend our democracy.**

The Electoral Count Reform Act would help close the loopholes Trump attempted to exploit in order to maintain the presidency. This legislation would ensure that the electoral college votes reflect each state's popular vote for president and make it harder to object to electoral votes.

This bill would be a step in the right direction toward defending our democracy and ensuring that an event like January 6 never happens again. That's why Kim is working hard to pass this important legislation, but she wants to know if you're with her.

clean_body: The Electoral Count Reform Act would help close the loopholes Trump attempted to exploit Peter, We're quickly approaching the two year anniversary of the January 6 insurrection. After months of Donald Trump peddling his "Big Lie," a violent pro-Trump mob stormed our nation's Capitol building as Kim and her colleagues met to certify the results of the 2020 presidential election. In the time following this attack on our democracy, not enough has been done to prevent an event like this from ever happening again. That's why Kim and her colleagues in Congress are working to pass the Electoral Count Reform Act to defend our democracy. The Electoral Count Reform Act would help close the loopholes Trump attempted to exploit in order to maintain the presidency. This legislation would ensure that the electoral college votes reflect each state's popular vote for president and make it harder to object to electoral votes. This bill would be a step in the right direction toward defending our democracy and ensuring that an event like January 6 never happens again. That's why Kim is working hard to pass this important legislation, but she wants to know if you're with her. | Thanks, Team Schrier = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: Giffords.org
subject: Challenges
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The next two years present some unique challenges for us.
#

Friends -
We’ve talked a lot about our success over the past decade of our work, but the next two years present some unique challenges for us.
We are working every day to make our communities safer from gun violence. Every day. But we can’t do it without your support.
[**So please, contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford before our year-end fundraising deadline so we can be ready for the challenges ahead.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221219-1-15&t=1&akid=2885%2E3935704%2EcAXELk)
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221219-1-15&t=2&akid=2885%2E3935704%2EcAXELk)**
Here they are:
**Republican majority in US House:** With the House of Representatives transitioning to Republican control, we know that some of the more extreme members of the party will try to advance the gun lobby's top priorities including deregulating silencers, concealed carry reciprocity, defunding the ATF, and arguing (falsely) that any gun safety legislation is an infringement on Second Amendment rights.
**A narrowly divided Senate:** The effort to pass gun safety legislation through the Senate continues after the historic success of the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act in 2022. With a working majority of 51 in the Senate, Democrats will now have greater control to set the agenda in the Senate and its committees which present key opportunities for Giffords to push for further legislation and secure important funding.
**A radical Supreme Court majority:** A conservative supermajority in the Supreme Court issued a decision in New York State Rifle & Pistol Association Inc. v. Bruen, finding that there is a constitutional right to carry a handgun outside the home for self-defense. The gun lobby wants a world where everyone is carrying guns, but more guns in public will only escalate gun violence, leading ever more people to feel unsafe in their own communities.
**Dangerous trends in states:** Despite an overwhelming majority of Americans who support gun safety laws, and in the face of spikes in violence and increasing gun deaths, extreme legislatures passed radical bills that will make their states less safe. In 2022, advocates and courageous lawmakers successfully blocked extreme bills. However, reckless and dangerous bills were enacted into law. AL, NH and WY restricted or outright banned state law enforcement from enforcing federal gun laws. AL, GA, IN and OH repealed laws requiring a background check and permit to carry hidden, loaded guns in public. And in Florida, Ron DeSantis wants to do the same.
Please know whether gun violence is in the news and when it is not, the gun lobby never rests. And neither do we.
But that is why we have to ask:
[**Can you please contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford before our year-end fundraising deadline so we can be ready for the challenges ahead?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221219-1-15&t=3&akid=2885%2E3935704%2EcAXELk)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17016?c0=giffords-em-dec22.jP9tfI&refcode=em221219-1-15&t=22&akid=2885%2E3935704%2EcAXELk)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cw1qcH&refcode=em221219-1-15&t=23&akid=2885%2E3935704%2EcAXELk)**

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:

Peter, Did you see the news? Today the Washington Post reported that Sinema had been scheming with Mitch McConnell for months in advance of her party switch, even as she left top Democrats in the dark until the last minute. No wonder Sinema was flying to Kentucky to sing McConnell’s praises just weeks before the election instead of helping Arizona Democrats beat pro-insurrectionist MAGA extremists Kari Lake and Blake Masters at home. If Sinema has proven one thing during her time in office, it’s that Arizonans cannot trust her to defend them in the Senate–she’s looking out only for herself. ******[Make a contribution now to help us get a head start to defeat her in 2024 >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fc5ZFZO4MJ7ghDwVDR2t2nsZG5ZXvQtof6-rBLepfl82jh0SPBi684WqfmLAHvyMAMhpJlhVR6SW034tvPhwAeufgnrDEN8hPWP91C0KO9JwR4H9PIMFyCktfSuAinhvuMUMumDDDGXlxwkE9PAX0Cetl1OLTWEvcRl0rW5U1Pa_NTjFC-WMI44hTbV88HZBxJGVknsi4jrhGKZaGiLBPb5HS36CXofKaEeMCz-irkQzU6ozXKPhNHwWpd3KGdf-qzt5fdjsSzI4OV4bERAuJBRZ3gmUY1WvyPkpCXRiaM94k-FWc_v_jDH1rT5DcqpAKI/3s4/1-XfYx-8QXG8n0PaBMLzdA/h0/Hcxj6Yb4-QRxYXarEeMhRK8pFVS_1se80vjynVVjyRU)** As the Washington Post reported: _Sinema had been weighing a departure from the Democratic Party for months, people familiar with the timing said. By the fall, planning was underway, even before Sinema appeared in late September at the University of Louisville McConnell Center, where she defended her centrist brand of politics — and further enraged some liberals — with the Republican Senate minority leader, Mitch McConnell of Kentucky, looking on._ **_McConnell advises Sinema frequently_** _, according to a person familiar with their relationship, and the two spoke about her decision to defend the legislative filibuster and other matters. “She and I talk all the time,” McConnell told reporters Tuesday._ The paper also said that Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer and President Joe Biden were given little notice of Sinema’s plans, and the story implied that her same-state colleague Senator Mark Kelly was also left in the dark. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Stand for those with no voice
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7666%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=okVEZs0B2baGqIQVexVZtQ&sysid=1)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten--or ignored--some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97494%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Rqpy167PK66D1YNGeyXj4w&sysid=1)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97405%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fJ%2bZyX27KJ9r3qUz1P1Y4A&sysid=1) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97406%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PnRRPFVOvtll4sNeB4Cw8Q&sysid=1) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---

clean_body: I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. | | | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten--or ignored--some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive. Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: American Action News
subject: Before they’re gone
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zah4d5vkqo9kgsu0uh0j9itppfri0jbgmqdsit80_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ulh74d9icepn0o70sqobdcbjcepn7cjl65qn6p31c1oj4sjgmcpb9cll6ppbedpnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphheipm4o3nc1j3cp5jcorr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or7chgm9o30shj649fg)
| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z71fc5ik8av0slr9hbprcg1t0716si1vl985u6p8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5ie0o74cph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze2u1amm0b7cqvddggcarvcunml1llo5k43mb2v8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5ie0o74cph2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu23c0a2h4mdlt73ijahrpbefdv46oqt1aocputg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5ie0o74cph2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb23i85kljp48v5sgctlaimjeeep3e4futuftj88_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5ie0o74cph2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z26lg33popuk12scddebmcgpdl00qul5cj4ajvg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5ie0o74cph2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Standing up for life
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze0bbc7lcgp8ct36duf2ghaa1alcd5bbfo135peo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5ie8pr4clh2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0m1dvomqa9htm5qjgdegetgtd7cvlj8vdldbf68_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5ie8pr4clh2bs) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrlddj4qj7v872viakb8ttliuuoqaj0uf4fit2do_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5ie8pr4clh2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Defending our elections from foreign interference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
I've reintroduced the Honest Ads Act:
Peter,

2024 is going to be a huge year in American politics, with the House, Senate, and even the White House on the line. We _need_ to bring transparency to online political advertising to protect our democracy. **And today, I have some good news to share:**

Last week, I reintroduced the Honest Ads Act in the House. This bipartisan legislation will work to prevent foreign interference in future elections -- something every American should be able to get behind! And it will improve the transparency of online political advertisements.

At a time when threats to our democracy are clearer than ever before, we need to bring transparency to our campaign finance system and take action to prevent foreign interference in our elections. The American people have a right to know who is paying for the online political ads they're seeing.

**[This legislation is vital, Peter, and I'm working to make sure it becomes law. To sign on as a citizen co-sponsor of the Honest Ads Act, please add your name right away.](https://act.myngp.com/el/2yunRl09C4kN7HAw_OZUnC2aT2x35pPOJ0FoE5Yp0zc=/S0Nxn-ndpmd7musXBysF_lsSRKMT0OtfbcppCch3-FI=?ms=em22_221219_hstads_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&refcode=em22_221219_hstads_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&source=em22_221219_hstads_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221219_hstads_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

There are disclosure requirements for TV and radio ads, but no such requirements exist for online ads. This creates a massive loophole that can lead to foreign interests using the internet to attack our democracy. We should never let that happen. The Honest Ads Act will stop bad actors from using dark money through online ads to influence our democracy.

I'm fighting to make sure Congress brings our laws into the 21st century. Will you join me in this important effort by signing on as a citizen co-sponsor of the Honest Ads Act?
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/2yunRl09C4kN7HAw_OZUnC2aT2x35pPOJ0FoE5Yp0zc=/S0Nxn-ndpmd7musXBysF_lsSRKMT0OtfbcppCch3-FI=?ms=em22_221219_hstads_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&refcode=em22_221219_hstads_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&source=em22_221219_hstads_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221219_hstads_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})
It's an honor to serve you,

Derek

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

Peter, It might be the most wonderful time of the year. But Biden’s cost-of-living crisis could make this the most unaffordable Christmas in four decades! Inflation is through the roof – and many Americans are being forced to cut back on their Christmas shopping. That’s why we’re reaching out today. We’d like to know how Bidenflation is affecting you this holiday season. Has your Christmas shopping been more expensive this year?
