disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

It’s 2016. Bernie Sanders shocked the establishment and mounted a historic
challenge for the Democratic nomination. And then — the Democratic
establishment lost against Trump.

It was clear that the party insiders and political machine could not be
trusted to protect our democracy or fight for our people. We needed a new
path forward.

So we built it ourselves. Justice Democrats was formed by people who gave
our all to the progressive movement Bernie brought together and were ready
to create the infrastructure to keep the momentum going for years to come.

We set out to change Congress by recruiting and electing a diverse slate
of working people who share real-life experiences with the communities
they represent. And we have, thanks to support from thousands of people
like you who share our vision.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123629?refcode=em20221219-26640&t=1001&akid=26640%2E1203867%2EOgiliv ]We’re ready to do it all again, but our work hinges on donations we
receive from emails like this one. So we’re humbly asking: will you donate
$3 to help us build our slate of Justice Democrats and grow
our movement once more?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123629?refcode=em20221219-26640&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26640%2E1203867%2EOgiliv ]Contribute $3

Our mission is simple. But when our politics has been consumed by
corporate money, elections favor entrenched incumbents, and far-right
groups like AIPAC are laser-focused on taking our candidates down, it
takes an incredible amount of work just to get regular, working people
elected to Congress.

That needs to change, and we will change it — but right now, we still need
major resources to pull off the scale of work we have to do to find AND
elect new Justice Democrats.

It’s our job to think about the long-term, which is why we’re starting our
2024 candidate recruitment so early. Planning this far in advance gives us
the time to go deep into communities to find our future leaders — that
can’t be rushed. It’s too important.

That’s why when we say your donation today makes a difference, we truly
mean it. Your support allows us to really invest in finding our candidates
right now.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123629?refcode=em20221219-26640&t=1021&akid=26640%2E1203867%2EOgiliv ]So what do you say,
Peter? Whether it’s $5 or $250,
every donation helps — can we count on yours today?

We’re here for the long-term, and we hope you are too. Thank you for your
support.

In solidartiy,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=26640%2E1203867%2EOgiliv ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=26640%2E1203867%2EOgiliv ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221219-26640-footer&t=1024&refcode2=26640_1203867_Ogiliv&akid=26640%2E1203867%2EOgiliv

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=26640%2E1203867%2EOgiliv

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: Leon Benjamin One Step Closer to Victory in VA-4 Special Election
body:
Benjamin Wins Republican Nomination for Upcoming Special Election in Virginia’s 4th Congressional District | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/937d19365440/we-need-more-veterans-in-the-house-do-you-agree-16726332?e=3cd8121505)
---
| |
---
| |
---
| _FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE_
---
|
# **Leon Benjamin One Step Closer to Victory in VA-4 Special Election**
---
|
## **Benjamin Wins Republican Nomination for Upcoming Special Election in Virginia’s 4th Congressional District**
##
---
|
# A well-known face and candidate in the 4th Congressional District of Virginia, Leon Benjamin charges forward, defeating his republican opponents and securing a win on Saturday’s GOP Party Canvass in Colonial Heights. Benjamin, a pastor, veteran, and former democrat, believes in uniting all people regardless of their political party. With a vision of unity and prosperity for all, he hopes to earn the hearts and votes of Virginians in his district.

A special election will be held on Tuesday, February 21, 2023, to fill the seat of late U.S. Representative Donald McEachin. Democrats are set to hold their primary to select a nominee early next week. Then the battle for who will represent Virginia’s 4th Congressional District begins.

After officially securing the Republican nomination, Leon thanked all of VA-4 for allowing him to represent them and he thanked God. He was grateful to his family, campaign team, and volunteers. He went on to say that the 4th came out strong and he was appreciative of all the prayers and donations. Leon also thanked his opponents Dale Sturdifen and Derrick Hollie for a well-fought campaign and said he looks forward to working with them to secure and seal the seat for the people.

Leon Benjamin is a husband and father who has faithfully served his country and community. He plans to continue his service as a representative and voice for all people of the 4th Congressional District in Virginia. Benjamin says, “Let’s do this. It’s time to help all people. I want to be your voice. It’s not my seat, it's your seat.”

clean_body: we need to know your thoughts on the Jan. 6th Committee before the first hearing begins: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Donald Trump, his allies, and FOX News hosts have continuously tried to dissolve the January 6th committee, intimidate members, and spread slanderous lies. So we’re polling 20 Pennsylvania supporters to show public support for Liz Cheney and other members of the Jan. 6 Committee. Please submit your grade below: | | | | | | Listen – Liz Cheney, Bennie Thompson, Jamie Raskin, and the entire January 6th Committee are getting close to holding Trump and his allies accountable for their role in inciting a riot at the Capitol. But far-right Republicans are attacking them left and right. Even Fox News Host Tucker Carlson has labeled the committee “illegitimate” several times. | | | | | Your input is valuable, Team Ruiz | PO Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference:** | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . name: E. Sanderson
subject: Picture this.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
This movement is about freedom, justice, and equity.
|
---

Team,
**Picture this...**
Your son is starting elementary school with the biggest smile on his face. Throughout the day you’re anticipating the excitement of him coming home. The bell rings. Is he there?
**Picture this...**
A pregnant woman living in rural Alabama with no access to reproductive healthcare leaving her with no choice in how to handle potentially life-threatening decisions.
**Picture this...**
Your children are finally able to vote -- but they live in a district where their voice is not heard and their vote is diluted by gerrymandering.
**Can you picture it? I can.**
When I joined All On The Line -- I saw that those very real experiences were the driving force behind each organizer, strategist, and advocate. Our fight has always been about the people and their real-life experiences.
[**Help All On The Line continue their fight for fair maps and a democracy that represents equity and justice. The fair maps movement is about more than redistricting. This movement is about freedom, justice, and equity.
All On The Line’s campaign has laid the foundation for why fair maps are crucial for our democracy. Our work so far made a real impact by folks like you -- and we’ve made significant progress toward a better tomorrow.
**But make no mistake -- there is more work to be done.**
Generations to come are depending on folks, like you and me, fighting to ensure there’s a strong democracy that takes communities’ issues to heart. In 2023, we will continue to press forward with those principles of fairness and justice as we prepare for redraws in states like North Carolina and to push back against voter suppression initiatives like in Ohio.
If I can leave you with anything before the new year, let the people be your source of what a strong democracy looks like. **_Each of us has the power to ensure that we don’t just picture a better tomorrow, we will live it._**
[**Make that difference today and give All On The Line a boost into 2023 with your donation.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56168316/384118696/742344613?refcode=20221219_AOTL_F_picturethis_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0ZmVjNTQ1LWY5N2YtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rsv_JPFdiqxowkd-Q7SQSaEKzJEq-3lQPz8KTvjJBTg=)
For freedom and justice,
Emuni Sanderson
Mobilization Strategist

clean_body: This movement is about freedom, justice, and equity. | Team, Picture this... Your son is starting elementary school with the biggest smile on his face. Throughout the day you’re anticipating the excitement of him coming home. The bell rings. Is he there? Picture this... A pregnant woman living in rural Alabama with no access to reproductive healthcare leaving her with no choice in how to handle potentially life-threatening decisions. Picture this... Your children are finally able to vote -- but they live in a district where their voice is not heard and their vote is diluted by gerrymandering. Can you picture it? I can. When I joined All On The Line -- I saw that those very real experiences were the driving force behind each organizer, strategist, and advocate. Our fight has always been about the people and their real-life experiences. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The fair maps movement is about more than redistricting. This movement is about freedom, justice, and equity. All On The Line’s campaign has laid the foundation for why fair maps are crucial for our democracy. Our work so far made a real impact by folks like you -- and we’ve made significant progress toward a better tomorrow. But make no mistake -- there is more work to be done. Generations to come are depending on folks, like you and me, fighting to ensure there’s a strong democracy that takes communities’ issues to heart. In 2023, we will continue to press forward with those principles of fairness and justice as we prepare for redraws in states like North Carolina and to push back against voter suppression initiatives like in Ohio. If I can leave you with anything before the new year, let the people be your source of what a strong democracy looks like. Each of us has the power to ensure that we don’t just picture a better tomorrow, we will live it. = For freedom and justice, Emuni Sanderson Mobilization Strategist All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. On October 27, 2022, Elon Musk officially closed on his $44 billion deal to purchase Twitter. Yesterday, not even two months after taking the roll of Twitter CEO, Musk appears to be stepping down from his role of CEO. This comes following a poll conducted on Musk’s Twitter, where he would go on to the popular decision of his poll for whether he should step down as the CEO of Twitter.

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Today's news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York
body:
Dan Goldman for New York [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94087/images/dsg_logo.png]
Peter,

On December 18, 2019, the U.S. House of Representatives voted to impeach former President Donald Trump for abusing his power and obstructing Congress.

As lead counsel for the Democrats during Trump’s first impeachment, I am proud of the work we did to ensure that Donald Trump and his lawlessness were exposed to the American people. We proved that a corrupt president had abused the power of his office to undermine our democratic process in a bid to stay in power — a betrayal of the American people and our constitutional order.

[https://lh4.googleusercontent.com/dp-e4gRlnJXHyRqIunKcvfPtdIZ6qUa8Uw--dMLOxejFHNu93kgkWAD9wy4tWm8yadCzVSy0kyIznw2l2OrcQv4ejyyZM-DfUgRKI56lVgoMeUV9n9l0XuD3fDfoYpHUkzelNF-79LVrOwMjOIpDgkrjo3jMAyax-S6DInE0OLAMwzHOq-djrQCqP8f2Tw]

Now, almost three years to the day since Donald Trump was impeached, the January 6 Committee took the most severe measure possible to hold the former, disgraced president accountable — referring him to the Department of Justice for four different federal crimes for his role in inciting the insurrection on the United States Capitol on January 6th and conspiring to fraudulently overturn his election loss.

Peter, our work didn’t end after Donald Trump’s first impeachment, and it doesn’t end today. The Republican Party remains firmly in Donald Trump’s grip. When Republicans control the House majority just a few weeks from now, they won’t wait a second to disband the House committee investigating the January 6th insurrection.

And instead of focusing on truth, justice, and solving the most urgent problems facing you and your community, they’ll spend their time focusing on frivolous and tangential investigations designed solely to gaslight the American people.

Well, I’ve stood up to Donald Trump and his traitorous MAGA allies before, and no matter what obstacles Kevin McCarthy puts in front of us, I’m going to continue doing everything I can to preserve and protect our democracy when I get to Congress.

Until then, I trust that the distinguished public servants at the Department of Justice will follow the facts and the law in order to take appropriate action “without fear or favor,” as their oath — which I also once took — requires.

And one thing is certain: The men and women who served on the House Select Committee to investigate the January 6th attack have demonstrated what true patriotism looks like — producing the most exhaustive and extraordinary investigations that Congress has ever seen. We owe them all a debt of gratitude.

Thanks and talk soon,

Dan
Dan Goldman for New York
PO BOX 3306
New York, NY 10008
United States
dangoldmanforny.com [https://www.dangoldmanforny.com/] | info@dangoldmanforny.com [info@dangoldmanforny.com]

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Will you support Ruben if he runs against Senator Sinema?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Over the holidays, Ruben is going to talk with his family about whether or not he should run against Senator Sinema.
#

Peter -
Over the holidays, Ruben is going to talk with his family about whether or not he should run against Senator Sinema.
If his family is there — and if the grassroots support is there — there’s a good chance we do this.
But that second part is key. Will the grassroots support be there? He has to know before he leaps. So we are asking:
[**Use this link to let Ruben Gallego know you would support him if he decides to run against Kyrsten Sinema for the U.S. Senate in Arizona.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em-signup-dec19/?source=em221219-1-30&refcode2=232.734936.d8XC0Y&akid=232%2E734936%2Ed8XC0Y)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em-signup-dec19/?source=em221219-1-30&refcode2=232.734936.d8XC0Y&akid=232%2E734936%2Ed8XC0Y)
It may seem like taking on Senator Sinema will be easy.
It won’t.
She’ll start with around $8 million in the bank, a very significant head start.
She’ll start with the support of the hedge fund industry and big-monied interests she has supported time and time again.
There is only one way we take them on and win, and that is if we’re in this together. So please:
[**Use this link to let Ruben Gallego know you would support him if he decides to run against Kyrsten Sinema for the U.S. Senate in Arizona.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em-signup-dec19/?source=em221219-1-30&refcode2=232.734936.d8XC0Y&akid=232%2E734936%2Ed8XC0Y)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em-signup-dec19/?source=em221219-1-30&refcode2=232.734936.d8XC0Y&akid=232%2E734936%2Ed8XC0Y)
There is so much on the line: voting rights, abortion rights, climate change, economic fairness and more. This seat is critical.
Thank you,
Ruben Gallego for Arizona

Peter, Did you know that 2023 is an important election year? Elections don’t just happen every two years: There are some KEY municipal and local level elections across the state in 2023, and _**Democrats have a chance to secure some really important wins.**_ [**Will you rush a donation to Indiana Democrats right now to help us WIN on the local level?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56162794/384092212/1643342139?refcode=221219-FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWJiYjBkMS1kMzdmLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=feT6riITWhhgGVo0Lz5zekcH-Tieze-6A00N9FM0z4Q=) | [Chip in! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56162795/384092213/405560545?refcode=221219-FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWJiYjBkMS1kMzdmLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=feT6riITWhhgGVo0Lz5zekcH-Tieze-6A00N9FM0z4Q=)
---
**_The truth is, local races can be even more important than state-level or federal races._** These officials have the power to impact some of the most common issues we all face, from public school curriculum, to road quality and infrastructure, to accessibility of healthcare resources.
And Republicans aren’t sitting these races out. No, they’re rolling up their sleeves and working to elect some of the most extreme candidates to these critical seats!
**But we can stop them, Peter — with your help.**
We’re investing in year-round local organizing across the state, and with your support, we can make 2023 a successful year for our party.
[**Can we count on you for a small contribution today? Even $10 or $15 will make a huge difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56162796/384092214/1643342139?refcode=221219-FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWJiYjBkMS1kMzdmLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=feT6riITWhhgGVo0Lz5zekcH-Tieze-6A00N9FM0z4Q=)

These officials have the power to impact some of the most common issues we all face, from public school curriculum, to road quality and infrastructure, to accessibility of healthcare resources. And Republicans aren’t sitting these races out. No, they’re rolling up their sleeves and working to elect some of the most extreme candidates to these critical seats! name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I'm taking a stand
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8un4g05598eafi4qeu8pjho0bqtbnrj7fmtsjhg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5ie2ob4c3h2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znfof34rkvuidtdl66trb4p59j8m1m166ti0lu1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5ie2ob4c3h2bs) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5mqc31aot29pajbmqhcvrhdd488k0tio3e8otoo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c5ie2ob4c3h2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright © 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Full Mag News
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” | | | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9cbe7774da04a3eb2ab2d8ab86defd5&_e=Em98jqmTwR1eiIc-RQ15MZbMsbQC-pShlWHF1VIYx5d6v4vRdykOwsn2AZny9ib4aqyOMNgKMuHRgZzaRAiTWOTKlcxXnccVVrWCE5o5nu746MhHpfePzUDFexDOKYGXbDmeXsv67-uc28xuInyA95VJ0F7ILYuqZ7OuOE3xQ83x1GO2nPpCqHp1Eq8_1LOA_LGXEnWancFgjfMHf9qpkFmOif_mMRvEXgUx4e-QDej-Vl0nBDNFikYYlHu2NgYtaWoRFItg9pcaglI8SnMoLSIF1ojSgt6XUIWbqFbk6JtSdi1Qsyi-hmg1wEbzJCsuFBZ-BVMjb3sW3a2ZNWAR_zq_SjCUKJJuJCgwbfNEBCx67XFrAbRZaGwZ4NZ1SkJPitkJIp2JIpsigygWY6nLzTUTXG6Dpgeg76veeFTocQQ%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9cbe7774da04a3eb2ab2d8ab86defd5&_e=Em98jqmTwR1eiIc-RQ15MZbMsbQC-pShlWHF1VIYx5d6v4vRdykOwsn2AZny9ib4aqyOMNgKMuHRgZzaRAiTWOTKlcxXnccVVrWCE5o5nu746MhHpfePzUDFexDOKYGXbDmeXsv67-uc28xuInyA95VJ0F7ILYuqZ7OuOE3xQ83x1GO2nPpCqHp1Eq8_1LOA_LGXEnWancFgjfMHf9qpkFmOif_mMRvEXgUx4e-QDej-Vl0nBDNFikYYlHu2NgYtECwsg6sZOYkIhT1QpWn2Ao4-X_Ybhf0UsCRz1zF2ibdeRMcxd1npkr6aYKxHAeBmf2zF48CtqGXAkvnwco2yR4Pk7bQ8ay9tJ_z8891eRX10sPlDPLoq4OezmTQYy-U7YH43KSght3LZWH3Y9xuilnTbtLW_V1FwVgoALrArcJ0%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9cbe7774da04a3eb2ab2d8ab86defd5&_e=Em98jqmTwR1eiIc-RQ15MZbMsbQC-pShlWHF1VIYx5d6v4vRdykOwsn2AZny9ib4aqyOMNgKMuHRgZzaRAiTWOTKlcxXnccVVrWCE5o5nu746MhHpfePzUDFexDOKYGXbDmeXsv67-uc28xuInyA95VJ0F7ILYuqZ7OuOE3xQ83x1GO2nPpCqHp1Eq8_1LOA_LGXEnWancFgjfMHf9qpkFmOif_mMRvEXgUx4e-QDej-Vl0nBDNFikYYlHu2NgYt5e-5P6v8bY1pzSo-_W9FbkguqwOg0V_bpSuNcobRJc_lHxEi2mVDxzpGKyqPVitn8HnrZdU__F0kXZuKuQ1F1Or208my60c85KmfKDZsmE8OMS9psm1i-v2V7PCWUHDalBayQUxkM7rQHVLdR8QCXSSxttScBg5CVJ3XtVNQQAA%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. clean_body: A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” | | | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of Imprimis --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below? Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... . . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. Why is this? Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to reach and teach millions has never been more urgently needed. That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. By responding to the National Survey on Socialism in the next five days, your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to reach and teach increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education. Warm regards, Larry P. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” | | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f75ed340ab8448db53b1b9c85c98f45&_e=vCgB9MNDlEmxdUvg8krJS7-EGWGN6OCKm0KlVLOh4P9Z0i0kWchvNtCK4YTFAkns_pXW52XBgnvbIxT3y_O9d1VYBprZKJpAMOs0JVZPnkooZw0bTXvufJ9K1uNHrA3YtCz8U9BaIfVQK1o_d_4SN8QAq_hUnLoL4hrMC_9O8gjtCnYm7WFLgV3jKbGzT-4J6lY7uIUxMW4VW3kU19EugdHwcfCn30cAVivkewjp52QpWKr6i0jkVP33RVA0JWfFjl0NlQajbsJ7a6lxpP6NEJ7ArQsL1HSw3-DbIaXZq69XmIYszXnWJ-mqWnraT28Pu7IXUZL3gUrOwAYpNNYk-xXOMVRnJ1p7ycv44CnsNncJfdeEhgTozRIFgAieHo_3ezNHeNUJsU1hR_XITmv7GXE2tr9LUyM0Kr6ZUqGzcU4%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f75ed340ab8448db53b1b9c85c98f45&_e=vCgB9MNDlEmxdUvg8krJS7-EGWGN6OCKm0KlVLOh4P9Z0i0kWchvNtCK4YTFAkns_pXW52XBgnvbIxT3y_O9d1VYBprZKJpAMOs0JVZPnkooZw0bTXvufJ9K1uNHrA3YtCz8U9BaIfVQK1o_d_4SN8QAq_hUnLoL4hrMC_9O8gjtCnYm7WFLgV3jKbGzT-4J6lY7uIUxMW4VW3kU19EugdHwcfCn30cAVivkewjp52QpWKr6i0jkVP33RVA0JWfFzdd-immve_dRnkjQMrU7HznqgFONvHxfx7qj89v7FgH4qcqkmKNgi1SWWHRTzunYVxR25po-zFlPyZSj2rIUC8o9QN1C9362JvgHw8shz8d3mR4JbUZYiXh5UAIlGzI01U1ppil-IlYddKGwOzznTTUc0s91bpgPN_dVWYm92qk%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f75ed340ab8448db53b1b9c85c98f45&_e=vCgB9MNDlEmxdUvg8krJS7-EGWGN6OCKm0KlVLOh4P9Z0i0kWchvNtCK4YTFAkns_pXW52XBgnvbIxT3y_O9d1VYBprZKJpAMOs0JVZPnkooZw0bTXvufJ9K1uNHrA3YtCz8U9BaIfVQK1o_d_4SN8QAq_hUnLoL4hrMC_9O8gjtCnYm7WFLgV3jKbGzT-4J6lY7uIUxMW4VW3kU19EugdHwcfCn30cAVivkewjp52QpWKr6i0jkVP33RVA0JWfF2BwK4NQxuk4rKzZ1bRm1l8JClGfJ2cYFqyIN7JTVimbDmf1a1pp7mZaeucTGT5EfodbyCYyIoXSo5zETZHFuKB74bPK1_zQ0qSd8fXCkuJVYod3sjZLxNxDE48Vn97oBvkEey_5cJeG97qBQPjTdtiSOGxhURNfl1cmB4W-Iv7k%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

clean_body: A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” | | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of Imprimis --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below? Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... . . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. Why is this? Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to reach and teach millions has never been more urgently needed. That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. By responding to the National Survey on Socialism in the next five days, your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to reach and teach increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is here
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91e30027113241c7a1aa2429b317989f&_e=Ujz97SaYB8HgtlF2xtV0sBp0UGV2ZqzeNFQPBtWQibTQ0nN9bFoD8058-99dATdxZDXf0vgBMVA630niUQUEV9epORn0U10xXUXvw7bC0zJpkVA9VA6IklX9YF6bVsve44wlgnv6K0uz4rgNXqWfnFYyuv7MksGNBgaivbZYZxG1uadeadnDzASHgnkHQekbM2LMCOOjEeCCIUoZG_NMEyyo70wYgfDOm5h2SKbsoB8NdS1HZ30vrwNYFIDOznQzIWb-LUqoE5r9Ly475zw6_wZT0zD-WUpDxLtqpzAn__cmJxCfRDStmSR7hAzS-dIu8mToZcf686UrKW42YCmIkdt7Ud13aphpNcEvNh4drubWakq2qSMgfks-yri-n_9K)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* >From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91e30027113241c7a1aa2429b317989f&_e=Ujz97SaYB8HgtlF2xtV0sBp0UGV2ZqzeNFQPBtWQibTQ0nN9bFoD8058-99dATdxZDXf0vgBMVA630niUQUEV9epORn0U10xXUXvw7bC0zJpkVA9VA6IklX9YF6bVsve44wlgnv6K0uz4rgNXqWfnFYyuv7MksGNBgaivbZYZxG1uadeadnDzASHgnkHQekbM2LMCOOjEeCCIUoZG_NMEyyo70wYgfDOm5h2SKbsoB9fmpWbA1OHjYbF3DGM947YAKoQMReq-yqGbI8eNbhH5xzqDYmzKYmC2CQ08l8TCIpZzaU9UzhxsgWAqO4CLhv9ONI6y5RA014bT-E5Oo0cX-3M9pFwM5JbtFPsjgkkszc-7-iYj9ANqr3491hQcpUX)
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91e30027113241c7a1aa2429b317989f&_e=Ujz97SaYB8HgtlF2xtV0sBp0UGV2ZqzeNFQPBtWQibTQ0nN9bFoD8058-99dATdxZDXf0vgBMVA630niUQUEV9epORn0U10xXUXvw7bC0zJpkVA9VA6IklX9YF6bVsve44wlgnv6K0uz4rgNXqWfnFYyuv7MksGNBgaivbZYZxG1uadeadnDzASHgnkHQekbM2LMCOOjEeCCIUoZG_NMEyyo70wYgfDOm5h2SKbsoB8IC47RsDtY9EU1PJJK1O-egmW0zVIrd1HdKhIABffpqX9jh5UE5CjViyt5MrAA_3usK9_6MlxdX5mVGkDctag70mvQaQsuK5i8-2EWWKWzJrBu0ZiXS4d8YJdxsH3NBFaWcIhSyfuvk9_X2spDhU1C)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We're offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91e30027113241c7a1aa2429b317989f&_e=Ujz97SaYB8HgtlF2xtV0sBp0UGV2ZqzeNFQPBtWQibTQ0nN9bFoD8058-99dATdxZDXf0vgBMVA630niUQUEV9epORn0U10xXUXvw7bC0zJpkVA9VA6IklX9YF6bVsve44wlgnv6K0uz4rgNXqWfnFYyuv7MksGNBgaivbZYZxG1uadeadnDzASHgnkHQekbM2LMCOOjEeCCIUoZG_NMEyyo70wYgfDOm5h2SKbsoB_rZRCjCTbeblRrl9pRMTpIbgiVeNZi9FXeb-l-qg83qeMqVx44todxy9an4C8FBOoVV8TDXYf8wpvoMVTnCUltl6hgIJrmYTkQ6dv_bcZmCtJI45ClDtUcBKjRfi5SL03fVVLlLCOHq8wNmYDf6HyU) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I'm excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| | **BREAKING: Majority of voters say Elon Musk should step down as Twitter CEO**

Elon Musk’s reign as Twitter CEO has been a _disaster_ — _he re-instated Trump_ and let the site become _ground-zero for anti-semitism_ and hate speech.

A new poll shows that the vast majority of Twitter users want Musk to resign, so we need to hear from TOP Democrats like you to gain your input. [**We need to know:**

name: Katie Porter
subject: Competition is central to capitalism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
Prices go up, wages drop, and innovation stalls.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15567%2E3422442%2Ev1On13)
**Competition is central to capitalism.** Without competition, prices go up, wages drop, and innovation stalls.
**The meat and poultry industry exemplifies what happens when competition decreases**. Just four companies control 85% of the beef industry. And while we’ve all seen rising meat prices, large meat companies have reported rapidly growing record profits in the billions.
I’ve spoken out against many recently proposed mergers—from grocery stores to airlines—that would mean even fewer choices and higher prices for families. And in markets that have already been consolidated: I’ve introduced legislation to end taxpayer subsidies for Big Oil companies and stop Big Pharma from price gouging.
**Capitalism needs guardrails so that we have a strong, stable, globally competitive economy that supports workers and families.**
To help me stand against mergers that will lead to higher prices and fewer choices, sign our petition.
**[Add your name ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-competition/?source=EMAE19_COM_20221219_V1_F&t=2&akid=15567%2E3422442%2Ev1On13)**
Thanks for being on Team Porter.
Katie

Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to update your information, please **[click here.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-update-info-footer/?t=3&akid=15567%2E3422442%2Ev1On13)** Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters chipping in to emails just like this one. If you would like to receive fewer emails, please [**click here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=15567%2E3422442%2Ev1On13).

To contribute via check, please address to: Katie Porter for Congress, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues Air Force Academy for Records about Critical Race Theory and ‘White Supremacy’
body:
Judicial Watch announced today it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit for United States Air Force Academy (USAFA) training material records on critical race theory

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 19, 2022
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61467&L=28598&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctc3Vlcy1haXItZm9yY2UtYWNhZGVteS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==) | **[Judicial Watch Sues Air Force Academy for Records about Critical Race Theory and ‘White Supremacy’](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61467&L=28598&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctc3Vlcy1haXItZm9yY2UtYWNhZGVteS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==)** The lawsuit was filed in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the Air Force Academy, a component of Department of Defense, failed to respond to an August 5, 2021, FOIA request for any and all PowerPoint presentations used for training and/or classroom instruction discussing critical race theory (CRT) and/or “white supremacy.” Judicial Watch also requested emails about this issue for Air Force Academy senior leadership. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced today it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit for United States Air Force Academy (USAFA) training material records on critical race theory | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 19, 2022 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | == | == The lawsuit was filed in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the Air Force Academy, a component of Department of Defense, failed to respond to an August 5, 2021, FOIA request for any and all PowerPoint presentations used for training and/or classroom instruction discussing critical race theory (CRT) and/or “white supremacy.” Judicial Watch also requested emails about this issue for Air Force Academy senior leadership. == ---|--- | | | | == | == Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a lawsuit on behalf of FBI analyst Marcus Allen in the U.S. District Court for the District of South Carolina against FBI Director Christopher Wray for violating Allen’s constitutional rights by falsely accusing him of holding “conspiratorial views,” stripping his security clearance, and suspending him from duty without pay. == ---|--- | | | | = | = Besides smashing a record for apprehending a ghastly 2.4 million illegal immigrants along the Mexican border last year, the Biden administration is also making history for drastically slashing the number of criminal aliens that get deported. In its first nine months the administration removed 71% fewer criminal aliens arrested by local police compared to a comparable period in 2019 under President Donald Trump. = ---|--- | | | | == | == Judicial Watch obtained the records through a September 2021 Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit filed after the FDA, the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) and the National Institute for Allergy and Infectious Disease (NIAID) failed to respond to a June 2021, FOIA request biodistribution studies and related data for the Pfizer, Moderna and Johnson& Johnson COVID vaccines (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (No. 1:21-cv-02418)). == ---|--- | | | == Just the News Judicial Watch has filed a lawsuit against the FBI for having put on administrative leave an analyst for espousing “conspiratorial views” that suggest support for the Jan. 6 Capitol riot. == = The Washington Times As Tom Fitton, Judicial Watch chief, tweeted in reply to the swirl of condemnation against Musk: “The Left’s hysterical response to @ElonMusk’s criticism of Fauci (along with slight mockery of transgender extremism) is something else. That they have so much invested in Fauci’s authoritarian approach to public policy speaks volumes.” = == Legal Insurrection Westerly, Rhode Island, father Robert Chiaradio was convinced that if only people could see it with their own eyes, they would join his battle to remove Maia Kobabe’s book, Gender Queer: A Memoir, from the high school library. == | CLIPS == == | = | | == | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | == | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2022, All Rights Reserved = |

subject: Rural districts are critical

body:
BACKROADS PAC has been able to help numerous candidates in rural districts, and we’re already getting ready to help elect more in 2023 and 2024.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56165961/384108143/1360616079?refcode=BLU-BRP-20221219-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTVmMmFmMy1lNzdmLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P1kMREQEWOuzGIU3yKCmpy8XSNvTI93jt-BMBRz3BZ0=)

| | | **“A new analysis of the midterms by centrist Democratic think tank Third Way finds that most Democratic candidates improved on President Biden's 2020 performance in rural America”** – Axios
---
Peter,

Though many were predicting a “red wave” this year, Democrats were able to prevent one from happening, largely because of how well they performed in rural areas. Many Democrats even outperformed President Biden in these districts, signifying how important Democratic policies are to rural communities.

That’s exactly why I started BACKROADS PAC. Rural districts are critical in elections, yet they are often ignored. BACKROADS PAC has been able to help numerous candidates in rural districts, and we’re already getting ready to help elect more in 2023 and 2024.

[_**Will you support BACKROADS PAC by contributing whatever you can today? body:
At midnight on election day, I was ahead of my Democrat opponent by nearly 30,000 votes... | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f04aa208ace1450f8698f750f0481f62&_e=iFSJDTmloeGspvdQGKvLNqhXrYgzc1Ia8lK84lUqEyKHgo9fP49S9l2jGB7YcFz2jnZYMTJjrBTK58wVAPWHqcODZl4y63jFrU3-hEWqGe0lpGGmoqlR3XqiYlIRpKY9F5r8ze_tGz7Cm-168scyk34M-i36jyGy2iXvBL0Z0fqY4sWMVwQC8aTMP29Y93D-yQr5w-_2W-sbCxXapwKCVfUq6p8X9JZrgQOhdYzOZzf1ySymLf5cCzBchsUgs0ryjkq-9X1lVrP9gbo-KuEfSJwvJAt5P20oHk1XOSi1W2v5payMuldI5ZMTdP4Pwvf1Fr0Fmw99oqmrmhIMZ6nmLcITs2-R6MEKJnWVyx-lwdhFUGuiYYJfgkNjZq3I4-LRhuof4FtIdgKdw3O_pw8MZw%3D%3D)

| | Friend, I’m Claudia Tenney –– I’m a _small business owner_ , _Marine mom_ , and _conservative congresswoman_ from New York. I’m also heading up the _Election Integrity Caucus_ , a position I was uniquely qualified for due to the events surrounding my 2020 election race. I was involved in a **100-DAY LONG** post-election recount and legal battle. At midnight of election day, I was ahead of my Democrat opponent by _**NEARLY 30,000 VOTES!**_
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f04aa208ace1450f8698f750f0481f62&_e=iFSJDTmloeGspvdQGKvLNqhXrYgzc1Ia8lK84lUqEyKHgo9fP49S9l2jGB7YcFz2jnZYMTJjrBTK58wVAPWHqcODZl4y63jFrU3-hEWqGe0lpGGmoqlR3XqiYlIRpKY9F5r8ze_tGz7Cm-168scyk34M-i36jyGy2iXvBL0Z0fqY4sWMVwQC8aTMP29Y93D-yQr5w-_2W-sbCxXapwKCVfUq6p8X9JZrgQOhdYzOZzf1ySymLf5cCzBchsUgs0ry9NEjkJIBSMJ7NKFu4W7yUNoZ9xe588UZes9WXWT78zXxS7Y58tt8GlsjtflxWg5QguEH2sbbpaaRL0Vwcl0NO7GsL7-L4aCVvp9vYhP3hzRR8ikz3vXL4otI3DFND2m_bF9Gczt5Vk4asXQEB2Tp0g%3D%3D)
---
| | Even with outstanding absentee ballots, my opponent’s chance for victory was slim.
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f04aa208ace1450f8698f750f0481f62&_e=iFSJDTmloeGspvdQGKvLNqhXrYgzc1Ia8lK84lUqEyKHgo9fP49S9l2jGB7YcFz2jnZYMTJjrBTK58wVAPWHqcODZl4y63jFrU3-hEWqGe0lpGGmoqlR3XqiYlIRpKY9F5r8ze_tGz7Cm-168scyk34M-i36jyGy2iXvBL0Z0fqY4sWMVwQC8aTMP29Y93D-yQr5w-_2W-sbCxXapwKCVfUq6p8X9JZrgQOhdYzOZzf1ySymLf5cCzBchsUgs0rytaMyTC13hPQenfKy3LaYVhYg2Il6JTh7MSum3BFwfap1t-mpzOk9wgAtfNraE6a9agCmoXBSKg1QvJoPyXXlkt5kDoqbOjM5id6UOMu-9Rx1AuSTBUNwLE1r3rhBLtU2gMJVRuNoZcCUEKOF64nLjg%3D%3D)
---
| Over the next 90 days, we fought against a team of lawyers who abused the legal system and tried to cherry-pick ballots and play games in NY-22. They pulled out every shady tactic in the book to try to push my opponent ahead.
---
| | Eventually, the New York Supreme Court got involved and conducted a thorough, transparent, and fair review to all parties. **After every ballot had been scrutinized and every legal vote had counted, I was declared and certified the winner by a slim** _**123**_**votes! **
**That didn’t stop my opponent or Nancy Pelosi from trying to overturn the results of my race and undermine me at every turn. ** I decided that day that I never want what happened to me to happen to another candidate again, I was going to lead on reforming, securing, and auditing our election system.
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f04aa208ace1450f8698f750f0481f62&_e=iFSJDTmloeGspvdQGKvLNqhXrYgzc1Ia8lK84lUqEyKHgo9fP49S9l2jGB7YcFz2jnZYMTJjrBTK58wVAPWHqcODZl4y63jFrU3-hEWqGe0lpGGmoqlR3XqiYlIRpKY9F5r8ze_tGz7Cm-168scyk34M-i36jyGy2iXvBL0Z0fqY4sWMVwQC8aTMP29Y93D-yQr5w-_2W-sbCxXapwKCVfUq6p8X9JZrgQOhdYzOZzf1ySymLf5cCzBchsUgs0ryNcJ5h1ltd8PT8cDX7-mqW4pXKtC4XstSJoaoLAaE7ULpOzgNuA3nNsmqpId0qj4LGFH-YvGEbHUPxglUuGO2eQi3gFJ3Ro4Sym-b4-UHgqsPRU2E7J0inSSqC6Mm-YI_Q6nBSi6LgcuncE6oSKn0iw%3D%3D)
---
That means implementing common-sense reforms such as: ** ➡️ Mandatory Voter IDs** ** ➡️ Banning Ballot Harvesting** ** ➡️ Preventing Unsolicited Ballots** And foremost, ensuring our elections are: **FREE ✅ FAIR ✅ACCURATE ✅ TRANSPARENT ✅** For leading this fight, I’ve been constantly attacked: **Slandered by the Radical Left...** **Smeared by the Mainstream Media...** **Shadowbanned by Big Tech...**
But I will not be intimidated. I will not be silenced. And I will never back down. That’s because I’m fighting to take back New York, I’m fighting to save America, and I’m fighting for you, Friend! **Friend, they wouldn’t be attacking me if I weren’t effective in this fight—**[**a fight that I hope you’ll consider supporting with a small donation today!**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f04aa208ace1450f8698f750f0481f62&_e=iFSJDTmloeGspvdQGKvLNqhXrYgzc1Ia8lK84lUqEyKHgo9fP49S9l2jGB7YcFz2jnZYMTJjrBTK58wVAPWHqcODZl4y63jFrU3-hEWqGe0lpGGmoqlR3XqiYlIRpKY9F5r8ze_tGz7Cm-168scyk34M-i36jyGy2iXvBL0Z0fqY4sWMVwQC8aTMP29Y93D-yQr5w-_2W-sbCxXapwKCVfUq6p8X9JZrgQOhdYzOZzf1ySymLf5cCzBchsUgs0rytjBQhd61PQNDfnyrCPELq3GSSgnJlhqLiBPLH4hRgLBtljC-CKrgzTW_xOKHfBNHFunYp3iJVO4yRqUlTGiVNi6oxqhH5KdxKYpV5wQw9zMb0Gd0zooqZ4LZQWZkHxgtTDEBjAgb7Di0H83fztm1cQ%3D%3D) Thank you, Claudia Tenney
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f04aa208ace1450f8698f750f0481f62&_e=iFSJDTmloeGspvdQGKvLNqhXrYgzc1Ia8lK84lUqEyKHgo9fP49S9l2jGB7YcFz2jnZYMTJjrBTK58wVAPWHqcODZl4y63jFrU3-hEWqGe0lpGGmoqlR3XqiYlIRpKY9F5r8ze_tGz7Cm-168scyk34M-i36jyGy2iXvBL0Z0fqY4sWMVwQC8aTMP29Y93D-yQr5w-_2W-sbCxXapwKCVfUq6p8X9JZrgQOhdYzOZzf1ySymLf5cCzBchsUgs0ryeIZD4BuKvS_AwbOAudc_ms6iw2REzwr5gOColD6dZJ453XJ48VH6xPOrIiBvUFnG5l3qnUtPK4QxUvLUTQqr516LtfUH28992jtGp5DiHeLKrwvH7z7BaajKw_HiwCvuXQetG-YoA_gdCWu6ckAh9A%3D%3D)

name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: Save my son from the woke mob
body:
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c86709d1fbd4a0e9a5adfe3fbf704f1&_e=Pbc6jLSjwooqIW_E7hA3QCt8axfVrAEW9VKg0HBYVzhEtd8XYUmFrevi1-1VIxZurgjPG8ugpl3KKWTvNikGWstHJScYZsDCzgZYdsKcEb0ZWxuBo4gqwi_ep-TaTFM3huLKaGRqHv4kcfEj2n14WxhQFq5Wencx0mai3Qc2Nbmknqqy7gOnWy1c4EDql0XTSWnSz57xqiR0G2iY3mSM8B50N_Na_YiXjdglhby6_fqR_o9X8cABlGjkCKZcmeI7fPpw6tbPTe9486RRgoKMSVfzdSRGNKk7K3zteLqrAV948AT3ETx9YU28zPw8szdsk_CAv3UQeRjAH8f9jEPXlw8yj_gY0GT0X__tYEiWDcw%3D)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c86709d1fbd4a0e9a5adfe3fbf704f1&_e=Pbc6jLSjwooqIW_E7hA3QCt8axfVrAEW9VKg0HBYVzhEtd8XYUmFrevi1-1VIxZurgjPG8ugpl3KKWTvNikGWstHJScYZsDCzgZYdsKcEb0ZWxuBo4gqwi_ep-TaTFM3huLKaGRqHv4kcfEj2n14WxhQFq5Wencx0mai3Qc2Nbmknqqy7gOnWy1c4EDql0XTgisCb2JnUgkTxKASey8wp_9IzK4YTvCMdTI1_0k2JZjc6cEaLil7fwCe-PHH8U_myRYMqtqrtyiipU_9gXe29_iz-LVXCZZ5z20GXkiQvh4MwTA7rQMW6ew_awYDO-OS5eRiH-JFDX6Tt04_mp2AowP3NXSXaa2tMnL9H4gGTnA%3D) [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c86709d1fbd4a0e9a5adfe3fbf704f1&_e=Pbc6jLSjwooqIW_E7hA3QCt8axfVrAEW9VKg0HBYVzhEtd8XYUmFrevi1-1VIxZurgjPG8ugpl3KKWTvNikGWstHJScYZsDCzgZYdsKcEb0ZWxuBo4gqwi_ep-TaTFM3huLKaGRqHv4kcfEj2n14WxhQFq5Wencx0mai3Qc2Nbmknqqy7gOnWy1c4EDql0XTgpKa_19ttbXHdcKQ8efm2i7hgu7tUF9wR091noQVhS0G-hq-QgF84NKem2lT8jxMPZpEoioW6KreE3kyUm8etgSUrEyMxGGCYPMjIQsHBtZTsd_XwLjqJRpK7hDsq020ulN8P7nxbASvE5co4vgkZB1tMipTHFdLDPrLLxJsQ6g%3D)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c86709d1fbd4a0e9a5adfe3fbf704f1&_e=Pbc6jLSjwooqIW_E7hA3QCt8axfVrAEW9VKg0HBYVzhEtd8XYUmFrevi1-1VIxZurgjPG8ugpl3KKWTvNikGWstHJScYZsDCzgZYdsKcEb0ZWxuBo4gqwi_ep-TaTFM3huLKaGRqHv4kcfEj2n14WxhQFq5Wencx0mai3Qc2Nbmknqqy7gOnWy1c4EDql0XTwzreBHpsMok6NRM_3m3jPt2E8JOIKOqzyY0GWqgmp0bR3tpRCqWcjONjYBOq6AoySsxOPIj9uQLp6KiXJrNjMCEGslEjIAoKo3ezXHsHpXdB89-35jvfTjzFFkLUSpVfLXFgAMf5HlQwuE65rg5_1wJXL_VwMaCZKNUl3yr_k1o%3D)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c86709d1fbd4a0e9a5adfe3fbf704f1&_e=Pbc6jLSjwooqIW_E7hA3QCt8axfVrAEW9VKg0HBYVzhEtd8XYUmFrevi1-1VIxZurgjPG8ugpl3KKWTvNikGWstHJScYZsDCzgZYdsKcEb0ZWxuBo4gqwi_ep-TaTFM3huLKaGRqHv4kcfEj2n14WxhQFq5Wencx0mai3Qc2Nbmknqqy7gOnWy1c4EDql0XT_iEPQZzUBn2B4bEuocE5NqkY4RZ9PUhKTMPnHyU0C5du1Z2BgYSDRpCWbq7yQJ60yTWuLKWYFmZeY3lfWR4Mn2bC07xBnqs-D4UIhWT_ntfxPdlZQxmKccafLbihMV_QeoYm02ZmRK1weoPyu9razDRnkJYMDnvgRr-izgE17q0%3D)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c86709d1fbd4a0e9a5adfe3fbf704f1&_e=Pbc6jLSjwooqIW_E7hA3QCt8axfVrAEW9VKg0HBYVzhEtd8XYUmFrevi1-1VIxZurgjPG8ugpl3KKWTvNikGWstHJScYZsDCzgZYdsKcEb0ZWxuBo4gqwi_ep-TaTFM3huLKaGRqHv4kcfEj2n14WxhQFq5Wencx0mai3Qc2Nbmknqqy7gOnWy1c4EDql0XT-q5ii4BRjnnJC_cXkBHJqiKcAqKZeDfLHoh2PfsIFtUxzEbCQXXAem3NHvUL8zJG8szvNUWRYLHm2Hj6Wo97ciiYKsRuqqtyyO4-MG6_dfTfCGz41n6nt4_NRW2a-QPB2TLKDD1313lnKXMf_Hx3TRVQgkJYv7-pJn6dS3YlEFE%3D)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c86709d1fbd4a0e9a5adfe3fbf704f1&_e=Pbc6jLSjwooqIW_E7hA3QCt8axfVrAEW9VKg0HBYVzhEtd8XYUmFrevi1-1VIxZurgjPG8ugpl3KKWTvNikGWstHJScYZsDCzgZYdsKcEb0ZWxuBo4gqwi_ep-TaTFM3huLKaGRqHv4kcfEj2n14WxhQFq5Wencx0mai3Qc2Nbmknqqy7gOnWy1c4EDql0XTzlkVyqCpMXdHim5n9mV6v_6r7Ox4BsOuNfRw_WBtTD5th7VSYf3y-tQOT-A_U7YW3aYRtKbzqseNE0HUzl1wF4C6NDnii4oR37ZSV9k8QIuKhgU_TtrHkDmLArfWosOxbm92KGJYyMXSkzMfOKmRm5aDBZMkTU7IA2_nf-Z5SlQ%3D)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c86709d1fbd4a0e9a5adfe3fbf704f1&_e=Pbc6jLSjwooqIW_E7hA3QCt8axfVrAEW9VKg0HBYVzhEtd8XYUmFrevi1-1VIxZurgjPG8ugpl3KKWTvNikGWstHJScYZsDCzgZYdsKcEb0ZWxuBo4gqwi_ep-TaTFM3huLKaGRqHv4kcfEj2n14WxhQFq5Wencx0mai3Qc2Nbmknqqy7gOnWy1c4EDql0XTso5vUbR-NqKHlYMzFPLAYP9jort3fgnUcTe_2ir_Km_qW9I3GZag0Q-L7OWrTfu8RWzbN2VnMvVFeM8aY1Fj7d5h37FtfoP_L4F0QEsGkFLuFJLV1wGTh6PHDDtSYe4yarGbr6ENiIGz7WFC8fa-zbKJbMKd2dFu5HQdOQeusks%3D)
_That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c86709d1fbd4a0e9a5adfe3fbf704f1&_e=Pbc6jLSjwooqIW_E7hA3QCt8axfVrAEW9VKg0HBYVzhEtd8XYUmFrevi1-1VIxZurgjPG8ugpl3KKWTvNikGWstHJScYZsDCzgZYdsKcEb0ZWxuBo4gqwi_ep-TaTFM3huLKaGRqHv4kcfEj2n14WxhQFq5Wencx0mai3Qc2Nbmknqqy7gOnWy1c4EDql0XTaa3vWPQ6uIvsZIoidSkacBuo9zcFwXZovu-dceOWuhByxE23Dql7BnoFfDIOQQSJ4EkxXjqRQGgtTgvThRF5AVSyphibMx68E0uel0XfDQ4s89f_VCiPeRv5i1IDesfRU8q0kysNhsJXL0XruoD8PZ02IslzaqfbilFjvgrb5tc%3D)
_That's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c86709d1fbd4a0e9a5adfe3fbf704f1&_e=Pbc6jLSjwooqIW_E7hA3QCt8axfVrAEW9VKg0HBYVzhEtd8XYUmFrevi1-1VIxZurgjPG8ugpl3KKWTvNikGWstHJScYZsDCzgZYdsKcEb0ZWxuBo4gqwi_ep-TaTFM3huLKaGRqHv4kcfEj2n14WxhQFq5Wencx0mai3Qc2Nbmknqqy7gOnWy1c4EDql0XTbRr7qD3sOjUvvlWuS_s03lOB8nzvDLOjRzodL3ZtkbLZBilGMKI_o0uk7sFHJrxDm8ou4RQYGCaWm8Zr7lyQCrkIV2Q29c05B9CNAwPVv69jYSwuiLgXBTuBSqz-WXEjfnm1Ok--NuCEA8L1icB1YFoI9d5hQi7fwoAzXVS2riA%3D)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_

clean_body: I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael. Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas. But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck. That's Michael in the photo. In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve. I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job. Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty. It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years. What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need. I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist. Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats. Fear of losing their jobs. I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back. But I was wrong. So now Michael 's life is at stake for simply doing his job and we have nobody to turn to except for good hearted strangers like you. Let me give you some more of the details... Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade." The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police. Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man. When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car. The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him. Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired. The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene. My son suffered back and leg injuries. Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck. In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community. There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day. He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others. But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years. Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did? That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died. But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified. And then our whole world was rocked. Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted. Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said: "We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never." I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court. We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense. After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser. They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service. So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds. No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process. Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime." Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael. With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading. Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have. LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty. The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department. And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son! You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers. Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a I pray you will consider doing so. Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers. My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal. That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn That's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today. Sincerely, Margaret Mary Dunn PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind to help Michael will mean so much to my family. \---------------- More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!
