name: Amy Loudenbeck
subject: Thank You, No Regrets and What's Next?
body:
We have a lot to be proud of!
| | |
---
| Dear Friend:
We almost did it!
Yes, the disappointment is real, but so is the gratitude I have for everyone who supported my campaign and the more than 1.26 million Wisconsinites who voted for me.
Losing by 7,442 votes out of 2.6 million is a lot to be proud of when running against an incumbent seeking re-election to an unprecedented 12th four-year term.
I could not have come this close without the hard work of my entire campaign team, friends, family, volunteers and all of the wonderful people like you who have helped us along the way with your prayers, financial support and words of encouragement.
And for that I want to extend my most heartfelt and sincere thanks.
No, I don't regret running. It was an intense 12 months of hard work campaigning all across this great state, but it was absolutely worth it!
I also don't regret giving up my seat in the Legislature. I enjoyed serving for an amazing 12 years and it is time for others to have that opportunity.
Now, it's time for me to figure out what's next. I don't know what that is yet, but I hope it is something that challenges me, allows me to use my talents, and brings new people and experiences into my already wonderful life. Respectfully,
Amy Loudenbeck
P.S. - I wish you much peace and joy this holiday season - safe travels and stay warm!!
---
| |

clean_body: We have a lot to be proud of! | | | | Dear Friend: We almost did it! Yes, the disappointment is real, but so is the gratitude I have for everyone who supported my campaign and the more than 1.26 million Wisconsinites who voted for me. Losing by 7,442 votes out of 2.6 million is a lot to be proud of when running against an incumbent seeking re-election to an unprecedented 12th four-year term. I could not have come this close without the hard work of my entire campaign team, friends, family, volunteers and all of the wonderful people like you who have helped us along the way with your prayers, financial support and words of encouragement. And for that I want to extend my most heartfelt and sincere thanks. No, I don't regret running. It was an intense 12 months of hard work campaigning all across this great state, but it was absolutely worth it! I also don't regret giving up my seat in the Legislature. I enjoyed serving for an amazing 12 years and it is time for others to have that opportunity. Now, it's time for me to figure out what's next. I don't know what that is yet, but I hope it is something that challenges me, allows me to use my talents, and brings new people and experiences into my already wonderful life. Respectfully, Amy Loudenbeck P.S. - I wish you much peace and joy this holiday season - safe travels and stay warm!! | | | == == == | | | | | | | VOTE AMY WI | P.O. Box 527, Madison, WI 53701 | | == Sent by mailto:info@voteamywi.com powered by == ==

**FLASHBACK**

**The Night Before The Botched Election**

We were ready for a fair fight, but we were already concerned.

"We're so ready for fair elections, aren't we? And yet I know, like many of you & especially me, I'm worried about tomorrow. Who's worried about tomorrow?"

-Kari Lake

We had no idea thousands would be turned away at the polls.

**It was worse than we could have ever imagined.**

Team Lake has filed one of the most momentous election lawsuits in history, and it's only a matter of time before this corrupt system comes crashing down on itself.

We NEED your help. This team has to keep fighting until our questions are answered. The Establishment wants to play the waiting game -- and we need to be ready for the long haul.

clean_body: We knew something was up. | FLASHBACK The Night Before The Botched Election We were ready for a fair fight, but we were already concerned. "We're so ready for fair elections, aren't we? And yet I know, like many of you & especially me, I'm worried about tomorrow. Who's worried about tomorrow?" -Kari Lake We had no idea thousands would be turned away at the polls. It was worse than we could have ever imagined. Team Lake has filed one of the most momentous election lawsuits in history, and it's only a matter of time before this corrupt system comes crashing down on itself. We NEED your help. This team has to keep fighting until our questions are answered. The Establishment wants to play the waiting game -- and we need to be ready for the long haul. Best, Team Lake Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc. Sent to Full Mag News subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

It's Ted Budd. As we head into the holiday season, I wanted to say **thank you.**

**Thank you** for supporting my campaign and fighting with me all the way to November 8th.

Thank you for supporting my campaign and fighting with me all the way to November 8th. I am committed to serving you in the United States Senate and fighting tirelessly to lower inflation, secure borders, and most of all, stop the woke war on your freedoms. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Fighting for the lives of the unborn
body:
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten--or ignored--some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fee3b07a72e54999a7eff1d79b403490&_e=27QPzoXzV6pr4aPHftdNOS96TVj2ZEPprdckeON4OeiGYyY8dbCAzQwC-ZH_e6sOUbXyxN1YE0c-EI0F3hAKl92NkpcQRZyaCIcE_GQKQRvsFjORgDzJlO8oe8nT3z6Ut-jNCUL4dso8CKtCb_X4By0v6VLtmJAa9AxXVRoEqoPbV_LR_H9kHZZKUFzm_XosUuBOI8gtw1RjPNo4PYG30kxDff1R4LKXSsU-WibQQb665l4FsIB7s9ObT9XPlmY_mppIe4ZOmMvqsg6OJWG8bPiawFcH5MS77vANK108Ji6OgpnNYgUREc3ddtRPpIVWptN0ourHGZwwAZ9L_-Atn31vO8b3Ryo-V73XGUlBM0ikJdpXfvubUKv4S0_0hz1s)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I'm not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I've started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fee3b07a72e54999a7eff1d79b403490&_e=27QPzoXzV6pr4aPHftdNOS96TVj2ZEPprdckeON4OeiGYyY8dbCAzQwC-ZH_e6sOUbXyxN1YE0c-EI0F3hAKl92NkpcQRZyaCIcE_GQKQRvsFjORgDzJlO8oe8nT3z6Ut-jNCUL4dso8CKtCb_X4By0v6VLtmJAa9AxXVRoEqoPbV_LR_H9kHZZKUFzm_XosUuBOI8gtw1RjPNo4PYG30kxDff1R4LKXSsU-WibQQb554ner5JdwMNb6ijOlMLcO7MZTcnVHy4MnSxLNG998HblAA_ZW08NEGCBk3EYJniUtbhNlLyX-NQUN3LCVptfjvFy7kV8tutU4kHmXXHxEUxEs3Tdy3Dkt4syCMyaQXAs0pIU0ccSXdxxtY4jh0xgi) I've created a new pro-life pledge; I'd love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? clean_body: | | | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten--or ignored--some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive. Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I'm not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I've started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. I've created a new pro-life pledge; I'd love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. name: Eric Sorensen (personal)
subject: Results: highlights from our survey >>
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| I hope you had a great weekend, Peter. I had the chance to review some of your responses to our recent survey, and I want to thank you for your input and thoughtful responses on the issue that matter to you. It’s my hope to keep an open dialogue with our supporters, so expect occasional surveys like this one throughout my first term in Congress. One set of responses that stood out was from my question asking why you decided to support our campaign with a contribution. There were a few answers I wanted to respond to directly:
* Lois from Sterling, IL, said: _“It was absolutely essential that Democrats stay in power. And I always liked your weather reporting.”_ Even though Republicans have the Majority in the House, Democrats did better than anyone expected thanks to voters like Lois.

* Stephanie from Apple River, IL, supported me because she appreciated my _“efforts and education on climate change.”_ I’ve been working on this critical issue for well over a decade, and I’m thankful that people like Stephanie have taken notice.

* Glynn from Peoria, IL, voted for me because she _“believes in a woman’s right to choose.”_ Glynn, please know that I’m with you and will fight tirelessly to protect choice in Congress.

These supporters – and thousands like them across IL-17 – are why this district stayed blue in 2022. And when Congress comes back into session next month, I will fight to address the issues my constituents care about -- protecting our democracy, communicating about and combating climate change, and protecting reproductive freedom. Peter, I wouldn’t be doing everything in my power to address these issues if I didn’t start building resources now for our re-election campaign. So today, I’m asking you to jump on board and be an early supporter of our efforts to take back the House in 2024. Will you chip in any amount you can today? Here’s a good link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-q4-2022](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-q4-2022?refcode=em-12.19.22-all-Results: highlights from our survey >>&link_id=0&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-read-heres-what-you-told-us&email_referrer=email_1770458&email_subject=results-highlights-from-our-survey&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1770458)** I’m filled with gratitude for the supporters who took the time to respond and share kind words and thoughtful comments. I look forward to fighting for you and this great district in Congress. Thank you, thank you, thank you, Eric
---
[ **Donate** ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-q4-2022?refcode=em-12.19.22-all-Results: highlights from our survey >>&link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-read-heres-what-you-told-us&email_referrer=email_1770458&email_subject=results-highlights-from-our-survey&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1770458)

name: NDRC Breaking News
subject: we made history in Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
it’s been *forty years* since this last happened
|
---

**This is huge, team: This November, Democrats won full control of Michigan’s state government _for the first time in 40 years_.** This historic victory was a direct result of our movement’s efforts to secure fair maps. **FIRST, in 2018,** the NDRC supported the creation of Michigan’s independent redistricting commission – a reform approved by voters to make map drawing fair and nonpartisan.

**THEN, in 2021,** the commission approved what _The New York Times_ called “one of the fairest” maps in the country. Rather than favoring one party over the other, the new maps favored the winner of Michigan’s statewide vote.

**SO, in 2022,** when the NDRC supported Democracy Defenders running across Michigan, these candidates were able to compete on fair maps. _And – thanks to your grassroots support – many of them won._

**NOW, we’re continuing our work** to secure fair maps, protect voting rights, and defend democracy in more states across the country. [**_Will you pitch in to help nationwide?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56167475/384114458/-540275122?amount=30&refcode=20221219.1a_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwMzIyM2RmLWYwN2YtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RxD6qFEB64vBO55LKitSt7GcvSH-EQQz7werrS_1cBo=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**As Attorney General Eric Holder has said, “ Wherever Democrats can fairly compete, they can win.” Our work in states like Michigan _proves_ exactly that.**

But in states like Wisconsin and Florida, districts are _still_ unfairly gerrymandered, and Republicans have signaled that they intend to keep fighting to manipulate maps. That’s why we must continue fighting back and executing our proven strategy – state by state, and across the country.

clean_body: it’s been forty years since this last happened | This is huge, team: This November, Democrats won full control of Michigan’s state government for the first time in 40 years. This historic victory was a direct result of our movement’s efforts to secure fair maps. FIRST, in 2018, the NDRC supported the creation of Michigan’s independent redistricting commission – a reform approved by voters to make map drawing fair and nonpartisan. THEN, in 2021, the commission approved what The New York Times called “one of the fairest” maps in the country. Rather than favoring one party over the other, the new maps favored the winner of Michigan’s statewide vote. SO, in 2022, when the NDRC supported Democracy Defenders running across Michigan, these candidates were able to compete on fair maps. And – thanks to your grassroots support – many of them won. NOW, we’re continuing our work to secure fair maps, protect voting rights, and defend democracy in more states across the country. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = As Attorney General Eric Holder has said, “ Wherever Democrats can fairly compete, they can win.” Our work in states like Michigan proves exactly that. But in states like Wisconsin and Florida, districts are still unfairly gerrymandered, and Republicans have signaled that they intend to keep fighting to manipulate maps. That’s why we must continue fighting back and executing our proven strategy – state by state, and across the country. = – The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. # Hi Folks, Garrett Soldano here.
Click On Image Below To Watch Welcome Video
|
---
[ ](https://9l762.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/QVeFaZqIjT7tH0-Ar4EFpYXPl24doyinZJH-6q19gFfY_JBIEeFgV7KxPBRlx-gGBDwcpLwHMCVSSaAAKSWEoxLZay8vrYXWMh3IU0MAO_Yg-9MACvrD8SKISDkUsxHzkLvA9W8nt5aKrZXtA6k7a1__EDavM199sRvPPzRYB8LseaghmfJ1ov8JKe2YMbRIXY_sWudH)

|
---
Many of you have been fighting along side me over the past three years. It has been a knock down, drag out, fist fight in a phone booth, that's for sure.

|
---
We must continue to press on as a movement and take back our country in 2024. I started the Grassroots Army so we can have an organization to activate and motivate, America's greatest asset, ALL OF YOU to continue to inspire positive change in our country.

|
---
I will continue to do my part and provide you with up to date, accurate, and truthful information. So keep an eye out for these emails. I appreciate you all. God Bless YouGod Bless The State of Michigan &God Bless These United States -Garrett Soldano

clean_body: The power of one can lead to the power of many | | | | | | | | | | | | | Hi Folks, Garrett Soldano here. Click On Image Below To Watch Welcome Video | | Many of you have been fighting along side me over the past three years. It has been a knock down, drag out, fist fight in a phone booth, that's for sure. | We must continue to press on as a movement and take back our country in 2024. I started the Grassroots Army so we can have an organization to activate and motivate, America's greatest asset, ALL OF YOU to continue to inspire positive change in our country. | I will continue to do my part and provide you with up to date, accurate, and truthful information. So keep an eye out for these emails. I appreciate you all.
